user_comment: Comfy, Cute & Perfect for a Throwback Look

Super Comfy and exactly as pictured! Love the color. True to pictured. Stretchy fabric but not too stretchy. Quality is great. Washed up perfectly and fit is same after. Very comfortable for extended wear. Wore to Epcot and Hollywood Studios. Never felt too tight in waist as some do after wearing for long periods. Really nice pair of jeans! Bought the black and brown pairs. Haven't received the brown yet but had to send back the black. Bought same size as blue but they fit larger. Baggy in waist pelvic/tummy area and thighs and longer. Picture of both together posted. Picture of how they fit my frame. I'm 5'3" and 133lbs. I bought the medium.
I think they are flattering (at least i hope they are, lol) on my frame and I love where and how they fall on my shoes. (The extra inch + on the black pair was way too long and made a huge difference) I might try ordering the black again but waiting to see how the brown fit. Definitely will buy again! Definitely recommend!

Nice pants Reviewed size: 0 Regular
Height: 5’2” | Weight: 114 lbs
Measurements: 27” waist, 35.5” hips
Typical inseam: 29” (28.3” minimum — I don’t like pants hitting at the ankle)

I ordered these pants in white, size 0 regular.

The pants definitely fit well — they’re comfortable and fit nicely through the waist, hips, and legs. The length is technically fine, but they hit about one inch above my ankle, which is a personal preference issue for me. I don’t like pants that sit above the ankle. I noticed this is exactly how they fit the model in the photos, so the product is accurate — it’s just not my preferred look.

Even though I won’t be keeping them due to my length preference, these are still a great buy, especially for the price. At $18, the quality feels very good, the fabric is comfortable, and they’re not overly see-through for white pants.

I’m still giving 5 stars, and I may reorder them in size 0 Long, which I think would better suit my length preference.
Love these jeans!!! These jeans are very flattering and true to size. I am 5’5” and 130 pounds, ordered a size 6. The wash is beautiful and the stretchy fabric is so comfy.

Listen closely to this review I’m 5’7 on a good day and about 135 pounds. Bought I size 6.  I have long legs. Literally no ass muscles I honestly don’t know how I get around… my gluteus Maximus has been compared to a pancake. I just keep waiting for that to become cool. As a 90s teen, I prefer my jeans dragging on the ground but these are close enough since people wear pee wee Herman floods these days (what have we come to ). Super comfy, nice and stretchy. High wasted —almost a bit much but better than the alternative. 10/10 recommend
Size 14 Looks good in person. Length was fine but tight around my thigh with little or no stretch, I ordered a 14 so if you’re curvy size up.

Nice enough for cheap Amazon jeans Clearly not the greatest quality jeans. Stretchy but thinner. Comfy enough. The color is great, so is the flare. Definitely made for heels or boots instead of sneakers. Solid waist height, I probably could have sized up one size but these still fit fine.

Tall Girl Friendly !!! I never leave reviews but these deserved one! As you can see I’m all legs 5’9 and it’s so hard to find jeans that are long enough I ordered a size 4 long I normally wear size 6 because I like a loose fit but reading other reviews I noted to size down for a better fit because they have a stretch to them I couldn’t be more pleased they are comfortable don’t hug your stomach I ordered two pair I will be back for more ! In my pictures I showed how they look with and without shoes !
New favorite pair So flattering! Absolutely love these jeans. They fit really well and are comfortable. I’m 5’4 for reference.
Flattering fit!! True to size, quality worth the price. Fostering and comfortable.

Super soft and comfortable, but shorter than expected. These Lee jeans in the off-white ecru color are a great fit for me, except for the length. I am 5’3” and weigh almost 130 lbs. I have several Lee jeans in the same size. I am giving them 4 stars instead of 5 though because size 6 short is listed as having a 28” inseam, however it actually is 26.5”. For me, they will be fine hitting at the ankle when I wear them with sandals in the warmer climate. But I prefer my pants to be closer to the 28” seam length. It’s possible that I just got a faulty pair. I will reach out to the vendor and see. If they can replace them, I’ll upgrade my rating.

I do really love the softness of the material. It’s thick enough not to be transparent, as many white jeans tend to be. Yet they feel buttery soft and comfortable to wear all day.

I recommend, but be aware that at least in this color, they might run short in length.
Fit is great Get it! Love it and got a lot of compliments
MUST BUY! 10/10 with the pants! For sure please size up. I am 5’7 205 and they fit perfectly! I struggle with length for pants with boots for this pants were perfect! Will buy different colors

Jeans These pants are super stretchy and have great quality. I’m typically a size 6& 8 but just to be on the safe side, I went with an 8 and it’s perfect. It’s tight on the legs but not too tight in the belly. I hate jeans that cut my belly in half. These didn’t not. I’m happy!
Denim ripped was perfect My daughter is short but those pants did their job for our pictures

True ti size I'm 5'7 and 137 lb. Didn't the sz 4 they suggested would fit but they ate very stretchy. I got the 4L a.d they're perfect with heels. Would have given it 5 stars but they feel a little cheap

Super flattering & Hides the fupa!!! I never write reviews but these jeans are so flattering!! I am 5 ft 122 lbs I purchased a size 6 and they fit beautifully! I have a really big lower fupa from loose skin and stubborn fat yet this hides it so well! The material is a good quality too! Will be buying in other colors.

Very comfortable! I love these jeans! I usually hate wearing jeans, but these are so comfortable and fit true to size. The length is perfect. I can wear them with boots with a heel/wedge, sneakers, or flip flops. They have a little stretch to them which makes them comfortable. They are great! I wish they came in other shades, like light blue, dark blue and black.

fits perfectly and it's not suffocating tight fits perfectly, it feels stretchy
im 5'4 154lb

Fit right I always wanted a pair of these but was scared to order because some jeans fit me too loose in the thigh and it is not flattering.  These are perfect.  They flatter my shape and aren’t too big.  At first they were tight,  but they loosened up nicely after a few minutes.  Now they are comfortable.  The jeans are of very good quality.  Not thin at all.  But there is no stretch.  The color is a nice medium denim color.  For size reference I am 5’3 152 lbs with 41 inch hips.  I have a meaty belly.  And I got my usual size 29 (8) If I had gone up a size, they would have been unflattering throughout the thighs.  Length is ok.  Not too long but I did have to cuff them a little.  Nothing crazy.  I really like these jeans and I plan to order more colors.
Not cheap material! Super cute and worth the money! Love love love! Trendy, great material

Looks like a custom fit! Great fit.  The rise in the waist is high enough to cover belly pooches.  The button fly and flared legs give them a vintage feel.  They are the perfect length if you’re wearing heels, but they do drag a bit on the ground if you were to wear them with tennis shoes. I am 5’4 and 120 pounds.

Flattering Fit I love these jeans!  They are the perfect length and fit very well!  The material is a medium thickness and is flattering on the body. I love the two buttons at the top.  I am 5'5" and 209 lbs and the size 14 fit me perfectly.  I liked the stretch the pants have, as well!  I will definitely being buying another pair in a different color.
Great pair of jeans I’m 5’5” 160 lbs, size 10 and these jeans are the perfect length and fit.  Will be buying other colors.
Pantalón blanco Hermoso este pantalón blanco ..me quedó perfecto ..super cómodo y se mira una cintura hermosa
Perfect fit! These jeans are soft, comfortable, stretchy, and the perfect length for me. I'm so pleased I took a chance and ordered them!
Great jeans Great quality for the price, fits true to size, stretchy and comfortable

Comfy, cute, and quality jeans! In love!! I love these jeans! They've quickly become my favorite, and now I neglect basically every other pair I own. They are incredibly comfortable and flattering. They're super stretchy without losing their shape. In the photo attached to this review, I'd worn them for at least 10 hours prior to taking the pic. Comfy jeans are a MUST for me, and I can't wear any that are super restricting. These fit the bill and have soooo much give! I get tons of compliments every time I wear them! I'm a true millennial and resisted making the switch from skinny jeans, but I really think these offer the best of both worlds; they're form-fitting around the waist and hips and looser on the legs, without looking super baggy. I'm 5'2 and was worried about the length, but they're perfect (probably because they're advertised as cropped). They're true to size, as I'm generally a size 4 (sometimes a 2), and the size 4 fit like a glove. The material itself seems high quality, and I've washed them multiple times without any fading, shrinking, etc.

The only cons:
1) I do wish some stitching was added to prevent the raw hem from unraveling so much. If you buy the raw hem version, it's a TRUE raw hem - they essentially look like they're cut with scissors at the bottom. I wasn't sure how they would wash, but they look like a more natural frayed hem after washing. Still, though, I worry that they could eventually become too frayed because they don't have any stitching to reinforce the length. Already some strings have gotten a bit long, and I've had to trim them.

2) The price keeps rising! I'd love to buy more (probably without the raw hem), but I'll wait for a Prime Day sale to see if I can get a better deal. You can buy AE jeans for less on sale.

Overall, I'm super happy with these jeans and will plan on buying more in the future! My sister already bought some and is in love with her pair, too. I'd recommend these for anyone searching for jeans that look amazing without sacrificing an ounce of comfort!
Love these jeans! I love this brand!  Great comfort and keeps their shape,

Found some pants that fit! These are great. As long as they don't stretch out. They fit perfectly right out of the bag. The sad part for me is they only come in 3 colors.
I'm 5'6" and weigh 175.
They fit me! They fit me!
I love these jeans! I LOVE these jeans!!! So comfy! The best to dress up or dress down! And very true to size with a good stretch!

Too big and too short… how? I am 5’3 measurements 37/27/37. I ordered two sizes the 2 standard and 4 standard as I am between both sizes normally. Neither fit, both were too big in the waist and too short in the length. I’m not very tall but I definitely needed the tall which they were completely out of it. Quality seems ok, not super stretchy very rough feeling. I haven’t washed either yet. Debating on cutting the 2 standard to be crops.
Cute Glad I sized up! They fit great and I’m sure will drink a bit after washing which would be nice as they are a trade bit loose but that’s what I wanted

Not bad... If you get the right material I ordered these in a regular size 4. My measurements are 27" waist and 37" hips. The material is spot on to the description. They don't have much stretch, like real denim. The waist is a little snug but it might stretch out over time. I am happy there is no waist gap in the back! I am 5'4" and I felt that they were a little short, so I later purchased a 4 long. The 4 long material composition was completely different (less cotton, more spandex). A much thinner material and very stretchy. Although it felt better in the waist, I did not like it at all. It was definitely not worth the price I paid, so I returned the 4 long and I'm keeping the 4 regular. I got it during the prime day sale for about $30. Not a bad deal - but like I said, that's if you receive the pair with the described material composition!

THE REVIEW YOU NEED TO READ! I originally ordered a size 10 in both colors and they were entirely way too small and NO stretch and very rough.

I ordered a size 12 in the same 2 colors, and the dark blue were not soft, they were rough and hardly any stretch to them. They also were baggy in the knees and random areas, I am returning along with the size 10s.

I LOVEDDD the 002-blue ones... they were SOFT and perfectly stretchy. Weird how the same jeans with the same material make up are so different in feel and fit.

For reference, I am 5'7" and 174 pounds. I hope this helps someone as I rely heavily on reviews. See photos for reference of each.
The best jeans I absolutely love these Levi's from Amazon! I can't ever find anything like this in the actual store. The fit in perfect. I get many compliments!

Love love love these I love everything about these jeans. The fit is great. For someone with a big butt and thick thighs they fit in all the right places. Plus they have tons of belt loops unlike most women’s jeans so I don’t have to worry about the belt riding up and the jeans falling down. As a plus size girl it’s so hard to find pants that a cute and look nice. Thank you lee for a great product.

Best jeans !! I was in need of some good quality jeans but also love the stretchy ness of jeans. I was nervous to order online but this has been the best purchase I’ve ever made if I had the money to buy ever color I would asap!
True to size also but very stretchy.
RUNNN and get you a pair for the price also can’t beat !

Solid pair of jeans. I like these jeans. The material is not very stretchy, so be prepared for that, especially around the crotch area. I’m 5’3, 120lbs. Amazon recommended size 2 although my regular size is 4. I went with the recommendation and they fit a wee bit snug but I think a 4 would have been too loose so kudos to you, Amazon!
Fitted around the waist, and tush, while being loose through the legs. The length is about a 29-30 inch inseam. For me, this means I can wear flats but heels would look awkward. Luckily, I purchased them to pair with sneakers so they are perfect!

Cute! But NOT super low rise or even low rise! I'm definitely going to say this...
I bought the SUPER LOW RISE jeans from Levi's that came out in the early 2000's and these are NOT low rise. They sit very high. So I'm super confused as to why they aren't called mid rise or even high rise jeans. That's my only complaint. They are cute and comfortable, but not low rise. They are stylish and make your butt look good!

The button popped off! I ordered the recommendation XXL and was so surprised that these jeans fit. For context, I’m 6’1 and 255lbs so it is very rare that Amazon jeans fit. But this fit in the waist and the length was great. However… not even 15 minutes into my night and the button broke! It just popped off, the jeans were not too tight. The button is pointing attached. I was able to snap it back on. But it kept popping off all night. I was forced to wear my jeans unbuttoned to prevent me from losing the button
This would have been a 5 star review for tall plus size women. But the button issue makes it a 2 star.

Stylish jeans at an affordable price! Love, love, love these jeans!  They are super comfy and in my opinion, flattering!  I was skeptical about buying jeans from Amazon but I was pleasantly surprised and very happy with my purchase!  I only gave them 4 stars because I did have to have them tailored (hemmed) which cost a little bit more for me because I wanted to keep the same look of the hem as how they came.  I’m 5’3” - 160 lbs and I ordered a size 10.  Fit is fantastic and there is a little stretch in the fabric.  I’ve washed them and they are still fitting perfectly!

Easing into trendy styles Are you a millennial mom attempting gen-z fashion?

I will die with my side part and skinny jeans, but the allure of comfort and (some how) currently stylish intrigued me. Are you losing weight and looking for a reasonably priced pair of jeans as you continue to shrink your waist line?

These jeans are perfect. Flattering, comfortable, long inseam (for those of us who aren't fun sized or are blessed (cursed?) with a short torso and all legs.

Buy these. You won't be disappointed.

Thank goodness! Curvy girlies know how hard it is to find affordable jeans that also fit well. I work for Target so you know the uniform— and I’ve been busting up all my denim. 😤😤 So I found these in my search. The price seemed good but of course.. I can’t try them on. They fit so good I had to immediately write a review. The jeans JUST got delivered a few minutes ago. I rip em out the package.. Surprise, surprise— the stretch is niiiiiiice. Firm but forgiving. Lifts the bum. Smooths the shape and they are true to size. I’m a 14 in American Eagle jeans… 5’1”.. maybe 215.. heavier on the bottom. No ridiculous waist gap either. I’m literally about to buy another pair.
Great jeans !!! They do run big and are really long !!! I’m petite so I ordered the short version and it’s still very long ! But is great material, make you beautiful shape and sooo comfortable !!

Perfect flares with great options for tall girlies Finally found the perfect flares! These are chef’s kiss!! The longs (35” inseam) are perfect length for my 5’10” self to be able to wear platform tennies or boots with them. Longer is better with flares, lengthens the legs! Love the smaller back pockets and skinny through the knees, makes the booty pop. No waist gap, stretchy and comfy. I am ~165 lbs and usually between size 8-10, got a 10 long. An 8 would have been too small. Want to buy more!
Good buy Comfy, I can bend my legs, pants don't pull. I am 5’6, 130. I bought both a large and medium. Large too big, medium a bit snug but looks good.

Perfect mid rise for tall girls Decent for tall girls with long torsos, I’m 5’8 and the jeans don’t go above my bellybutton and fits more like a mid rise and comes right to my ankles. They are so comfortable and stretchy though and I will be ordering another pair because they are perfect for work!
Lee Jeans Perfect fit!

Best Pull-on Pants The best pull-on pants on Amazon, imo. These are so good. The value for the money is crazy good. They are soft and stretchy, but keep my nice shape. I have traveled in these on airplanes over and over because of the comfort. I ordered a size 2 and the waist is big, but a belt does the trick. Dress these up or down. Love these so much
Soft and so comfortable I absolutely love this brand of wide legs jeans. They are so comfy and when I showed my grandloves the picture of this particular pant they absolutely loved the look.

My New Fav Jeans I LOVE THESE PANTS. I don’t usually go for wide legged jeans but decided to try these because the price was right. I am so glad I did! I love the big bottoms, perfect for my heels. I am in a size 4. 122lbs 5ft 4in and they fit perfectly.

The Perfect Jean Love these jeans! I can't tell you how many pairs of jeans I've bought and returned for one reason or another. These fit so well with no waist gap, not overly long, not extra wide bottoms, and are well made. They are the perfect material for Spring and Summer. I bought the navy blue and they don't have the fake looking fading in the thigh area.  I am  5ft, 4.5 in. and weigh 167 and the size 16 fits perfectly. They may not be long enough for really tall girls because they just touch the ground if I'm not wearing shoes.

Significant Size Differences These pants are the perfect fit. I have them in almost every color! Only complaint is you NEED to size up, but you should size up 2 sizes in the Black Wash. They shrunk after I wore them and are already too small. I would also recommend only buying 1 of the plain light wash color, since I bought both and cannot tell a difference in the wash (and 1 of the lighter washes was MUCH smaller than the other). Otherwise these are my go to jeans!
Comfort These jeans are so comfortable. They feel like butter. I am 5’3 inch 150lb and size 10 is perfect. Length is perfect for a low heel as well. Very pleased with this purchase.

Comfortable jeans I really like these jeans
However I found them to run large.
I ordered a 4 after measuring.
A 2 would have been a better fit
I am 5’3” and 114 lbs.
The frayed edges at the bottom of the pant legs Frey more after washing as well
Black Chic jeans Love these jeans! So comfortable!
Great fit and quality My new favorite jeans!
Beautiful pants and fits very well but they are short. They come to my anule and I’m only 5”4. Sally I Need to Return them.

Leopard Print Jeans I was hoping these would fit better.  They are like a legging style with faux pockets, quality is good. I still like them and plan on keeping them. Fit is TTS for reference I’m 5’ 7” 145 lbs wearing a medium.

Comfortable, versatile, stylish! They fit great! Some reviews are saying they run small -I don’t think so. They are stretchy and movable. Not sure how long they’ll last, but for the price they get 5 stars from me!

“I’ll only wear these for Halloween” lol *adds more to cart* I LOVE these jeans!! I actually bought them for my Halloween costume (Joyce-Stranger things) and thought for the price and wearing them one day it was fine. Little did I know I would now be coming back to buy more in other shades. I am 5’4”, 155 lbs, and got a size 12 based off measurements I took. I was on my period so I do think a 10 would fit me as well, because there is comfy stretch to these pants. They are truly high waisted but I love that. Classic mom jeans win with extra stretch and comfort. After wearing them several hours walking around trick or treating, they did loosen like most jeans too, so that’s another reason I want to try a size 10. But with my weight fluctuations these will remain a commonly worn pair of pants. Hard to tell in the photos how high the waist is. But you can see there’s some looseness in the legs after 3 hours of wearing them when the pic was taken. I also felt the regular length was fine for someone on the shorter side. Classic 80’s fit, which is perfect for what I was looking for.

Cute jeans! Fits perfect! I bought the size 2 (125lbs). The jeans have a nice stretch to them, when leaning/bending. They are the cut off length, so not a capri, but I wouldn't wear them to the office. Super cute!
Cute jeans and good quality! Cute pants! Material is good quality. I would recommend to size down since they are really stretchy. But my daughter loves them!
BUY THESE!!! These are my go to jeans. They fit so well, which is often hard to find. They’re super comfortable, and just overall really cute. I have gotten soooo many compliments about these jeans!

They fit exactly as stated for US sizing. I bought two pair of these one in this blue and one pair in tan. They fit as stated to USA sizing. They look great. The waistband is not too tight or too loose.

Great Potential...Need To Get Sizing Dialed In! This is my fifth pair of No Nonsense jean leggins. My first pair was medium denim...great fit, great look, but the waistband pulled away from the pants to the point where I eventually couldn't wear them, so sad. Number two was dark denim. I still have them, great all around. Then I thought it would be smart to order another pair, since I wore them so much - ordered the EXACT SAME ITEM AND SIZE and they were laughably tiny.  So far from the correct size.  So incredibly far. Returned. Then I ordered the green color. Perfect! OK, I thought, they've figured out the issues...so I ordered gray. TOO SMALL.  Now keep in mind, I'm ordering the same exact size every time. 2X. YOU CAN DO BETTER, NO NONSENSE. I mean what is causing this?? Surely there is some kind of pattern they're using at the No Nonsense Factory?? Anyway, aside from that rather important item that needs attention, I do really like these pants and wear them to work almost every day. Versatile, comfortable (in theory) well made (mostly), great price point, flattering, wash and line dry. Please No Nonsense, work on these little size consistency and quality standards so we can love you all the way. :-) PS pictured are the gray ones. I'm sucking in my stomach and wishing for a little extra room, but they look mahvelous.

Must have many pairs!! The only brand jeans I have worn in a year and a half. Ever since stumbling on to them. I was hooked on my first pair. I have since lost some weight and went down a size. I have these in 4 colors and just ordered 2 more. They wash beautifully I machine wash in cold  n flat dry to avoid dryer fading. This is just my way I don’t dry most of my clothes. I am just about 5’8 160 pounds. I’m tall but I don’t have really long legs my torso in long and these jeans still are true high waisted and sit at my natural belly button. Finding true high waist jeans proved to be a challenge before I found these. I would say go by the measurements provided for sizing every woman has different curves and we carry our weight in different areas. I carry my weight in the thighs and booty. I bought 2 pairs of the distressed ripped jeans and I have shared the link several times with clients I’m a hairstylist. The position of the rips on the pairs I chose are not revealing at all and that is also not easy to find if you don’t want to show to much skin. . . But if your looking for a more revealing sexier look in your ripped jeans they have them too. I’m hoping as spring and summer approaches they will have more choices with the distressed fringed ankle. Do your curves a favor and order these jeans!! My boss tells me every time I wear these jeans that she is obsessed with my booty caught in her mirror from across the salon. 😍 show stopping fit!!

Comfortable, Flattering, Great Value - GO FOR IT!! Haven’t worn jeans in years, instead ankle-length, moderately supportive athletic leggings had become my mainstay. I am 5’2”, approx 115 lbs with tummy and let’s just say not massively firm from tush through to thighs — despite being a casual 3x/week runner...

After trial and error, I have determined I am a 2S... Any bigget or longer and they would not hit my ankles in the perfect spot, and the waist and butt would be too loose...

These things are A-MAZING... they provide support, smooth out my abundant lumpiness, keep my muffin top in check and feel great! I have yet to see how they stand up to linger wearing, whether they stretch out and wash well, but will report back with an update once I do...

While I certainly have obvious issues and a body befitting a 50-something, somewhat active woman battling the UNIVERSAL challenges of a changing physique (ahem) I am pleasantly surprised EVEN PLEASED with the magic of these jeans... I kinda feel like I am misrepresenting myself to the world (but in a good way, lol) ....

Love these so much that I have been wanting to order them in GALA, but they are not available... So as a back up I ordered another in Cape Town— the wash highlight on my first pair was perfect and happily, the over all tone is darker than it appears in the product pic. But the second pair ordered was visibly larger in the thighs and lighter in color overall and so I am returning them and hoping to re-purchase one that fits like the first and will wait patiently and hopefully until they offer the GALA in 2S.

If you’re on the fence I highly recommend you take a chance and order these… I would also recommend Levi’s gold label modern skinny Jean — very similar feel and fit and currently available in a very dark wash called immaculate… I have already purchased two of those and I’m very pleased… I never thought I’d have a jean wardrobe: I am thrilled! Thank you Amazon! Than you Levi’s 👍🏼🙏💕😎😍

The best of the best I love love love these pants. I usually wear a size 12 in US pants (5'8" about 190lbs). After reading  the reviews here, I bought one pant in a size XXL to try out first It fitted well on me but i figured that the waist could fit a little tighter. Next I bought 2 pants in a size XL. When they arrived and I tried them on, I could not contain my excitement. I then went all out and bought seven other colors.  Yes, seven to total 10 pant. That's how super-impressed and happy I was with these darlings. I even bought 3 for my teenage daughter who's growing like crazy and always have her long pants look like capris on her. When you first look at the pant, the waist may look small but don't be intimidated because you'll be surprised when you try them on. They're very stretchy and feel closer to jeans than tights. I especially love the fact that they reach my ankles and stay there too. The picture of me in them speaks for itself. I have also attached the different colors I bought. My daughter's pairs were not included here. I don't have to worry about these pants riding up. I have bought several pants on Amazon but these pants are the best so far. Let me say too that I bought these pants with my hard-earned money and I did not receive and discount of any kind.

Sizes are not accurate Bought this as a gift for an elderly neighbor and I read the size chart, checked the size chart of the measurements she has given me but they are way too big in the buttock area they sag.  If ordering doesn't go by the size chart b/c it is not accurate. The elastic around the waist appears to be cheap elastic used. I read the reviews that is what helped me to decide to purchase them or not. She washes all her clothes before wearing them when she washed the pants they fade. I suppose you get what you get.  Not a happy camper. They were a birthday gift for an elderly neighbor like I said..I was hoping they would look better than the photo of them in the description. Not as nice I thought I imagine they would be as in the photo. Update: Had to replace the elastic around the waist. I didn't buy these as a gift to have to do some moderation on them for the fit the elderly lady for whom I bought them as a gift for her birthday. I won't order again from this seller.

Update - Nice pants I do like these pants, however; I sized up to an XL based on some other reviews and their weight/height.

The pants fit comfortably, but feel too loose (despite the images making the pants appear tight on my midsection). I am wearing breifs in the pictures and still have the kanga pouch in front from baby #2.🤷🏼‍♀️

These pants conform to your shape very easily, so appropriate undergarments are necessary to prevent panty lines and bulges for those of us who have a little 'extra' in the middle.
They have a ton of stretch (maybe too much?) and the fabric is very soft. The length for the XL is a bit excessive for me.

I am 5'7 and the excess fabric travles in ripples all up the legs. Not a fan of that look. It also causes weird excess fabric in the crotch and below the bottom. They do not go over my belly button, which is a little disappointing, but not a deal breaker.
I've ordered a pair in large to compare the fit.
I'm currently/actively losing weight, so I would like to be able to wear these during and after I reach my goal of 125lbs. That may not work out, but it's nice to feel comfortable in clothes without having to wait until your thinner 🙄 lol

Currently I weigh 155lbs
Waist 29"
Hips 41.5"
Thigh (just under bottom) 26"
Thigh (middle) 22.5"
Thigh (above knee) 18.5"

I'll post another update with images of the large once they arrive and will update my review then (:

Hopefully this info provides useful 👍

UPDATE:
The large fits much better. I wore them out today and can say they are very comfortable. There was some slipping, but I was hauling a 35 lbs 1yr old around while shopping 🤷🏼‍♀️

As an adult I find most of my pants want to slide down as I walk - it's like graduating from those childhood frilled socks that would end up halfway off of your foot inside your shoes to pants that slowly walk your underwear down to only cover half your bottom. That or I may just suck at finding my true size.
I will say that since my last review I lost 3 lbs (currently153lbs).

These are not nearly that bad, and I think it has something to do with the softer material.

If I wore a belt I wouldn't have this issue - but I'm not a fan of them lol

So I approve of these and will be keeping them to add a pop of color to my closet 👍🏻

The photos with the mudded room and smudged mirror are of the size Large I ordered to replace the XL. Renovations aren't pretty 🤦🏼‍♀️

and I LOVE them! This is the first pair of jeggings I've purchased, and I LOVE them!!!!!! They look and feel like real denim jeans! I'm not a fan of 'skinny' jeans, but I decided to give them a go (because I can't find anything similar in boot cut or flare without a hefty price tag). I've seen pairs of jeggings at Walmart that looked.. well... not good lol. I've also seen other people wearing jeggings and you can totally tell that they are, in fact, jeggings. They look kinda cheap? But not these, they look amazing. I've never felt more confident in any other pair of pants (is it technically 'bottoms'?). I'm very happy with my purchase. I will give you a break down of my body shape and weight. Something that I absolutely hate!!! I have fluctuated up in down weight wise my whole life. I have some extra skin as a reminder. But, here goes...
I am roughly 5'8" and weigh 240. I am sort of awkwardly proportioned. According to me lol. I carry most of my fat in my belly. I have a hard time finding real jeans that actually fit me properly, because my legs aren't that big. My natural waist is 44, my hips are 54, and my lower hip measurement is 34. So when I try on jeans in a size I can get up high enough with my tum tum, the legs always look baggy and weird. Anyway, I think it's important to remember that I could be standing next to someone that is the same height and weight, and we will not necessarily be the same size. My weight is in my belly, but some are fortunate enough to have there's evenly distributed.
I ordered an XL, because I fit in to a XL in yoga pants, and leggings. They fit me perfectly. The length, feel, and fit was amazing. They aren't as thin as leggings, but they aren't as thick as some denim jeans. They structure to them, so they don't highlight every bulge. I hope this helps someone.

Heads up on defective dye job Just got two pairs of these jeans delivered today.  I know that I’m not the only one on a tight budget, so wanted to give folks a heads up about something that might be a dealbreaker for some, and was certainly a big disappointment to me.  These were not supposed to be washed or distressed jeans (although even if they were, they would still look on the odd side).  Both pairs have very distinct washed out stripes all across the upper front, and the upper front ONLY.  All of the rest of the fabric is the solid dark blue “Niagara” color that is shown in the description of the product.  This defect is not a good look.  In fact, it is a pretty silly and off-putting look.  If I hadn’t waited far too long to buy new jeans (and two pair hadn’t torn out recently), I would absolutely return these.  But my closet is pretty bare, so... I guess I will be wearing all my shirts untucked for a while!  : /  Anyway, now you are forewarned:  If your order turns out to be from the same batch, you may be stuck with making a return, or wearing your shirts untucked too.

Not the normal Chic pants. These are women’s pants but the legs are too tight. No mention of them being skinny legged pants. They are petite fit from crotch to waistband like they should be. The top of them fit fine. I have been wearing this brand for years but this material is not good. Very rough feeling and although washed in cold water they faded to almost a gray/black. Don’t know if you can tell in the pictures but the ends of the legs and top of the waistband look like they have been washed and worn many times and I’ve never worn them because of the tight legs. Since I’ve already washed them I will not try to return them but would not recommend these.
UPDATE: I stand corrected. I started wearing these casually and found that they do stretch out a bit as you wear them and they wash and dry very well. I have since bought three other exact pair. Just know to not think black like dress slacks and they are a slimmer fit in the calves than normal. Each pair I have since purchased have been a slightly different shade between black and dark gray. For everyday and casual wear they are perfect and I will continue to order them as needed.

Comfy, good value! I’m 5'4", about 165lbs, and have had two kids, and I ordered a size 14. These jeans are incredibly comfortable and fit really nicely. I probably could’ve sized down for the waste, but I wanted a little flexibility for bloating days. They have amazing stretch but aren't super thin so they feel really sturdy. Overall, they’re really cute, flattering, and budget-friendly, very happy with them.

WHERE are the in-between sizes, Amazon?? 🤦‍♀️🤨 These are my fourth purchase of women’s Levis from Amazon, and as of today my last. My gripe is this: The straight size women’s 501 Levi’s in a 34 are too small for me, but these-the NEXT SIZE UP, plus size 35/16- are too big. 😩🤦‍♀️ And there isn’t a size 14 on Amazon, but there IS on the Levi’s website. I can’t be the only person in this category that finds it infuriatingly frustrating that there aren’t Levi’s 501 WOMENS jeans offered in my size at all on Amazon.
These are supposed to fit close in the hips and thighs, yet on my apple shaped body they’re baggy. The waist is also too large, so when I bend the excess fabric in the front resembles a diaper. The length was maybe an inch long on my 5’6 frame. Sadly, these are going back like the others I’ve tried recently and I’ll just have to order from the Levi’s website. For reference, ones I’ve tried that didn’t fit me recently are:
Levi’s Curvy 501s in a 34- waist fit, too big in the hips and butt
Levi’s Low Loose in a 33- too big in waist and hips and legit an extra 12 inches of fabric pooling around my feet 😑

My favorite jeans My most favorite pair of jeans. I wish they came in more washes. They just fit me so perfectly in the right places. I am 5’8 and got a 16 long and they are just perfect. And an amazing price!
Love the fit of these jeans .. classic These have a perfect fit for an hourglass figure! 5’2..135 …real jeans and not just stretch pants ! Love .. they are stitched well and fit like jeans should ..
Unbelievable Did you really think I would be happy with a used pair of jeans, with something crusty on them and a broken zipper? If I could have rated 0 stars I would have. Very unhappy!!!!

Nice quality - Worth a try! I bought a 2-Short anticipating a fit, but they were too big. They're marked 2S, Waist 26 and Length 30. The rise is ~9.75" and fit just under my waist - which is a little higher than my idea of a mid-rise. On the plus side, the fabric seems to be of good quality - strong denim and good weight. Wish they came in a size 0, I'd give them another try. I ended up buying Levi's 315 Shaping Bootcut style in a 25 Short (30 inseam), and they fit perfect - they have a slightly lower rise too at 9.25". If you're looking for a nice fitting pair of jeans that aren't skinny or baggy, then either of these jeans are worth a try.

Love these. I am usually a 12 or 14. I ordered a 14 in these i tend to run bigger in the waist and I am glad I upsized. These are super stretchy and comfortable. They did shrink a little after wash but they stretch after wearing  Soft material and a great price. They have pockets and material is not to thick.

In love with everything except the length While I love the fit and the look of the jeans- stretchy and comfortable- I feel like somebody lied about the length. If this is tall/long, I’d hate to see average. Otherwise, absolutely love!!! (Ignore my Lovebug, just focus on my jeans and their length.)

Great jeans Great fit, perfect amount of stretch. Only thing, make sure you wash before wearing. I was impatient and wore them before washing. When I took them off at the end of the day my legs were blue lol. Washed now and no issies. Will buy again in different colors.

Best stretch jeans ever! Why did you pick this product vs others?:
I haven’t worn jeans for at least eight years and I did a lot of research before buying these. To be honest, I was expecting to have to return these due to a poor fit. BUT, I was absolutely thrilled to find out these fit sooo well and made me feel attractive! I’m short and curvy but these stretch  the right amount to zip up. Also are perfect for me 5 ft 3 height. I was so ecstatic to be wearing jeans again that I bought them in another color right away! Ladies, give these a try! Five plus stars!

Relaxed fit, runs a bit loose and long Ordered two pair of these, an 8L (recommended by Amazon) and a 6L (because 6 is my usual size in pants). For reference, I’m 5’7” and 125 lbs, abt a 37” hip. The 8L were big, boxy, too long and too loose (wrong size); the 6L were a better fit—definitely not tight, though at least 4” too long. Returned both these Long-sized Amazon orders, and since Amanda regular 6 was not available, I ordered a pair in that size elsewhere. The reg 6 fits better, though still longer than other regular-sized jeans I own (a plus—can launder without worry). The Amanda style is a more loose-fit style than skinny jeans, and definitely look looser on me than on the model. But they are a higher-waisted, stretchy style, esp good for when you’re going to be doing a lot of sitting (eg. travel).

*UPDATE: The 6R seemed to stretch out and get even looser after a few days of travel wearing last week. Based on reviews by others my size or larger, I ordered a size 4R (Zermatt), even though Amazon was now suggesting I order 6L. The 4R is actually the best fit in this Amanda style, and is still plenty long. *PHOTOS are of the 4R. (These pants did need to be washed right away due to strong chemical smell.)

2nd UPDATE: I ordered the exact same 4Reg GV Amanda jeans this week in black and in a medium (“Frisco”) blue. But both of these were 1” shorter and a bit snugger than the 4Reg powder blue “Zermatt” and navy “Scottsdale” colors I’d ordered before. Go figure. These skimpier 4Reg pants had a “Made in Bangladesh” label; the two blue options successfully ordered before are 1” longer and a perfect fit, and labeled “Made in Jordan.” Returning the Bangladesh jeans for refund; will try to just buy the ones made in Jordan.
Great fitting, poorly constructed Ordered a 4L, they fit like a dream on my 34” inseam. However, the button on the fly was broken and they had to be returned. Of course they’re no longer available 👎🏼

Cute…do not buy if you have a fatty Fupa. These are such a fantastic pair of pants, they have a little bit of stretch a nice high waist, very comfy and good material. EXCEPT they accentuate the crotch in a unflattering way. Maybe on someone else’s body it would not be an issue. I am 5 feet tall and they also run too long, would have to cut them or hem. Purchased a size 6, and I feel like they would stretch out throughout the day and be loose, if I were keeping them, I would size down and have them start out tight at the beginning of the day. The front is not cute, but the back is! If you don’t have a fatty Fupa, buy these! I’m going to return mine.

Too Short The actual fit of the Jean was fine and pretty true to size, but giving 3 stars because they were too short. For reference, I am 5’9 and ordered the longs and they were still too short. I would save the money and get a different pair if you are 5’9 and above.

I need to order these in more colours! - Update - I did Update in September 2024:

Well, I did buy them in two more colours. And I'm not particularly glad I did. The worst were the Ecru ones. A total disaster. Otherwise, I wouldn't have knocked off a star, but if it weren't for the blue ones, I might have knocked off two! I think my ecru pair is defective. All three pairs I ordered were 12 Long. In the first two new pictures, I aligned the crotch of my original blue pair with the ecru. The latter are lower in the waist (not a plus, for me) and so much shorter in the legs I would think they weren't "Long", although it is written on the labels. They barely touch the top of my foot, which definitely doesn't work with this cut! There is a lot more stretch in the ecru ones, which makes them sort of clingy. On the positive side, they are not see-through, in the sense that they are opaque. But you can see the outline of every bump and dimple on my knees. and the fabric clings so much that the ankles flare out, although when I laid them on the other jeans, I could see they are also cut that way. The blue ones have a slight taper, which makes them look straight on the body, since most people have larger calves than ankles. The ecru ones actually flare out a tiny bit at the very bottom, and it looks terrible on (you'll have to trust me, I have not taken a photo and have already gotten rid of the jeans!). Sadly for me, I live overseas and sending the jeans back would probably cost as mush as the price of the jeans, so I have given them to a much shorter woman in hopes she can cut them off above the weird little flare and get some wear out of them. I also think one leg is longer than the other. It looked like it on, and it looked ike it when I laid them on the bed. They were definitely new and had all the tags on, but there was a small brown spot on the back on one leg. I think it will wash out, but I didn't bother with it because the jeans were so hopeless. I think it might be fly p**.

I also bought the Washed Black. I have kept them and I think I will wear them. Thankfully, since they cost $48 US, which is quite a bit for an ordinary pair of jeans. They are also smaller than my blue pair, but I can wear them. They are longer than the ecru pair, a smidge shorter than the blue. The colour is nice and they fit better than Ecru (I forgot to mention that the ecru pair comes up higher in the front than the back!!!). As they should be, they are higher in the back than the front, where they are about two inches below my belly button (of course, I am tall, but then again, these are supposed to be long). They are also stretchier, more synthetic than the blue ones, but less than the ecru ones (synthetic jeans are not a good thing in my book). But they are okay. I think Anchor two years ago rates a 4.5, Washed Black in 2024 rates a 3.5 or maybe 4, and the Ecru ones I received on the same day rate a solid 2!!!!!!!!!!!

On the plus side:
These are my jeans. They fit very well and are very comfortable. Most of the time, Lee jeans in size 12 Long are as good as it gets on me. I need a 34" inseam and these, hmm, they might be 33", but they are okay. (I'm 5'11") Although I prefer a high rise, and these are mid rise, they are okay and do not give me a muffin top. They are straight leg, but pretty narrow. Just that little bit of extra fabric at the ankles so you can tell they're not jeggings. Actually, they're nothing like jeggings, because the fabric is fairly thick, although nice and soft and doesn't stifle you like plastic (it's 30 degrees Celsius/86 fahrenheit where I am right now, so that's important).

The colour is Anchor and pulling it out of the package, I thought it was darker than expected. Then I realized they have those fake wear marks down the front. The faded part goes to below the knee, so that it looks like I have really long thighs and short calves, whereas I am the exact opposite. But it's not a deal breaker. And there is a little whiskering on top, although not too much. I would prefer an even colour all over (hey, I'm on the far side of 55) but it isn't too bad. I really like these quite a bit, so I am going to go back and look at other colours.

Hope this helps!

Bad quality Terrible quality. The belt loop broke right off, wasn't even stiched on all the way. Fits bigger  than expected.  Very long and too loose on the ankles. Not colombian jeans. I have many many colombian jeans, this is not it.

Amazon jeans that finally fit! Finally. Jeans that fit right! For reference I’m 5’3, waist size is 27, I weigh about 140 lbs. I got the size 4 short. Love these pants!! These are my go-to work pants! I have four pairs and I wear them almost everyday. They go with everything, aren’t see through, have a super comfy elastic waistband - I could go on about how much I love them but just get some and try them on yourself!

Comfy and flattering! I ended up being more happy with these pants than I thought I was going to be!  I typically don’t like pants with no back pockets, but these made my booty look super good! The pictures don’t do it justice, lol. They’re superrrr comfy, too!

My new favorite jeans! I am 5'1" 120 lbs. My regular inseam is 28". I normally wear a size 4 so i ordered a size 4. The rise is 11",  so they reach right to my navel. These fit the description to the T. I'm 5'9 around 230 & I got a size 18 for length & space for my tummy area. They fit perfectly everywhere, I love the flair of the bottom, no smells, & still fit after drying.
Great price and fitting jeans!👖 Soooo Cute!  So trendy and comfortable!
So comfy and stylish Stretchy and big thigh friendly! No smell, color just as described! Will be buying more!

Long enough for tall girl Adorable, a little stretch and long enough for my long legs!! I do see the “scratchy” feeling people are talking about. Going to wash them and see if that makes a difference but I mean, overall I am pleased.

Perfect jeans for petites If you’re petite (I’m 5’2 @ 130lbs) and looking for high waisted jeans that are stretchy but fitted in the waist/hips and have wide legs, buy these! Comfortable but sizes run on the small side. These jeans run small. I am 5'9" weighing approx 149 lbs. I am wearing a size 2x. Little big I sized up and wish I didn't they are slightly big. They stretch quite a bit once on your body. Super thick quality material and make my butt look great!

Fit great and nice and comfy! I sized up because sometimes I wear a 4 nowadays but some sizes run small in jeans  and I kind of expected that with these jeans so I went for a 6 Regular. Really comfy. Really stretchy jeans  super comfy,  like it was way  too long . Iam petite 411 105 lbsSmall fits  n I didn’t like the white line on jeans.

Disappointed I used to buy these exact same jeans at Costco. During covid, I gave up my Costco membership. I was so glad to see these jeans here because they fit perfectly and we're great quality. Jeans are soft, thick, but size is unusual. I ordered the pants in my current size of 24 short plus size. They're comfortable and easy pull on/off. However, these jeans are thick. Other than that, they do their job well and look really cute. Overall, I’d give them a solid 4 out of 5.

What happened to my favorite jeans? I normally would give Lee jeans 5-stars. I have purchased Lee jeans exclusively for the past 20+ years. They have been the frustration-free jeans. The sizing and fit were perfect every time. Until this year. I compared the jeans I bought this fall with two pairs I bought last year. Same style--relaxed fit, straight leg. Same (marked) size--16W. The new jeans are almost a full size smaller. The width through the hips is narrower. The width of the legs is a tight fit not straight leg. The length is also longer.

Update: the jeans I purchased previously had been made in Mexico. The most recent were made in Egypt. Place of manufacture can make a difference in the cut and fit.

Love these -- hug my curves. I own several pairs of jeggings and I am a fan of these Ewedoos Jeggings.  They are a perfect cross between jeans/denim and leggings.  The material is an actual light denim type material (it isn't a legging material that is just printed to appear to be like denim), yet very stretchy.  The seams/pockets/belt loops are all real just like jeans (again, not just printed to resemble jeans).  I love that they are not as heavy as jeans and how they hug my curves.👖SIZING - check the size chart because the s/m/l/xl match a little different to US sizing 0/2/4/6/8/10 a little differently than I am used to.  I am 5'5", fluffy mid-section, 8/10 (L) in pants, 12-14 (XL) in tops -- I went with the Medium in these because according to the size chart, that was equal to an 8/10.  Overall, they fit well.  The material is very stretchy and forgiving.  I love how they fit in the legs (perfect)-- conforms nicely hugging my curves without extra fabric or folds.  The waist is where I am a little unsure. They do fit, however, because the waist band is thinner (and I am a bit fluffier in my mid-section than my legs would suggest) it is a little compressive just along that line (not in the stomach, just along the waistband).  I think that perhaps a large would have relieved this a bit. It isn't that I can't wear the medium, but I think the large would have been a bit better in the waistband.  The length fits me like normal 25" inseam fits.👖I definitely don't like the faux button.  When not wearing them, it looks like a cute idea, but when you put them on, because it is faux, it dangles out and isn't flush with the waistband.  Since the waistband is form fitting, the button really sticks out under the shirt.  I think I will likely cut it off.These are a good quality jegging, and I very much appreciate how these are an actual denim and not just a print made to look like denim -- and all the features of jeans are there with the comfort of a legging.  I might have sized up to a large for the waistband only (but wonder if that would have destroyed the curve hugging fit of the rest of it) -- I would say to definitely check the size chart -- it is pretty accurate but realize that an 8/10 is a Medium in this brand (not a large like most) and cross check your size before ordering.

Great pair of jeans for my blazer 5"8" 145lb

Pretty happy with these jeans! Good quality for the price. Decent thickness and a fair amount of stretch. I ordered a size 6, and I am 5’5” inches and weigh 140. I also have a large 🍑 so I often struggle with jeans and these ones were great.

Unfortunately I am returning these because the presentation and sewing are not acceptable.

The pockets pooch out, the pocket lining shows slightly at the top of the pocket, and the material does not lie flat.
The button holes have a single loose casting stitch around the edge and will fray easily, you can see how badly designed they are. Loose threads have not been clipped/fastened.

My backside looks good in them and I love where the pockets are positioned. I will be ordering them in a 14 L when I lose another 5 lbs as I am still recovering from my knee replacements. Runs a little small, but great jeggings 2023 UPDATE - when I say that I made these nearly an everyday staple for the past 2 years, I'm not joking. I wore these almost everyday, washed and dried them in the dryer endlessly. I finally purchased another pair (identical size and color as previously) and I am AMAZED at how well these held up! The wash slightly faded and there is one small spot where a thread loop (decorative only) came out of one back pocket.. that's IT. The fit hasn't shrunk in the slightest. So DO NOT HESITATE to buy these extremely high quality for the price and comfy jeggings!!!

I'm always looking for inexpensive comfy jeggings for around the house when I want to feel like I'm still in pajamas but not necessarily *look* like I'm wearing pajamas. Grabbed these in a size Small.

FIT
I would say these run small. Not insanely small, but in particular the elastic waistband is too small to be comfortable. I'm a 28" waist and generally order everything in XS but this waistband is really tight on my waist. Other than the waistband I like the fit of these leggings. I am 5'3 and they hit just below my ankle which I prefer.

QUALITY
These are super stretchy but still look like authentic Jean fabric and stitching so it looks good and feels easy to move around in.

LOOK/STYLE
I like the wash of these jeggings, they're exactly as I hoped for. I don't think that the overly small waistband makes these flattering on me so I will only be wearing these with longer shirts that cover most of that area. The stitching and look of the fabric is an authentic Jean look and not cheap looking at all.

FINAL THOUGHTS
I do think these run small and if you dry clothes in the dryer like I do, I expect these will eventually shrink and become even smaller. I recommend sizing up at least one size, maybe 2 if you really want to be comfy. I would likely purchase more of these in more colors and medium size next time

20 year lover of the brand...not "Wrangler" Quality I have been a loyal Wrangler customer for 20+ years. I've literally owned a dozen pairs of their jeans (Size 6 with a 34 inch inseam is what I'm currently rocking at 41 years old). I'm federal law enforcement and these jeans failed me at work in front of about 25 people...total embarassment (see pics). I purchased these off of Amazon for $45 along with a pair of Wrangler Retro high rise trousers and a pair of Wrangler Retro high rise boot cuts because my long legs need a longer inseam. Out of the bag, they were thinner and softer but didn't seem like they would rip or anything. My Retro jeans seem to be better made and are thicker. I am pretty active and they both had a decent amount of stretch.

My advice would be to stay away from these jeans and pay a little extra for the Retro line. Some people don't like the stitching on the retro line, but I like the nod to vintage. If you have are shaped like a woman....small waist, full butt and thighs like me--go with the Retro line. The sizing is spot on if you go by waist measurement.

SKINNY NOT STRAIGHT! 2 colors are the same and not the same as shown First these are skinny jeans NOT straight leg!!! Mystic Water and Cape Town are the same colors and they are both much darker than shown. I originally purchased Cape Town last year, it was a lighter blue like shown in the picture. It was a lighter fabric with some stretch. I wanted another pair because of it being a lighter fabric I was worried about wearing through and getting a hole. I repurchased the same pair. The Jeans came and they were definitely not the same. It had all the same labels but the next pair was definitely much thicker, coarse, scratcher, stiffer fabric. But the color matched the original pair. I throw them in thr wash every week in hopes of wearing down some of that stiffness. Fast forward to this weekend. Decided I was going to try again. Got the 1st pair Cape Town (which is what I purchased the 1st 2 times when I got the good color/light material and then the stiff coarse pair), fabric was great nice and light like the original ones however the color was much darker. Ok fine, maybe my mistake it was late at night. Same day I purchased Mystic Waters thinking ok this one should definitely be lighter color. Came this morning- great softer stretchier material but the same dark color as Cape Town. Which does not match the 1st 2 pair of Cape Towns that I bought. So all this to say- CapeTown and Mystic Waters are the same exact color and darker than shown. However they are currently shipping the less stiff fabric jeans.

They are soft and still look like jeans which I appreciate as a busy mom who also has chronic pain and other chronic illnesses.I don’t always feel my best when I’m wearing sweatpants because I’d like to at least pretend that I’m trying to look good even when I feel terrible. Not always easy to do. The only thing that I found a little annoying was the height of the waist —-a little too high for my taste but other than that these are really great and I highly recommend them!

Short inseam I so wish the pants were made in a regular size. The inseam is only 27.5 . I am not tall- 5.6 and regular size pants will have an inseam of 29/30” but this pants must be designed by a short person. Unfortunately I have to return them due to length. However, I love everything else about them, the thickness, the stretch, the perfect fit.

A little small for size They are a little tight for the size and If you are apart of the big booty club  they do not have enough room in the butt.  they will ride down in the back making you look like the plumber when you bend over or sit down. I am 5" 9 320lbs size 24. I bought the 24 long

Finally found the perfect jeans in AMAZON Wow finally found jeans on Amazon that I LOVE !! These are great in style, fit and also super comfortable. Length is perfect for me but I am only 5’3 but they would still look good on tall people as a crop style . The side panel is super cute and these are a true wide leg , not like others that claim to be , I will order the other colors !!

No stretch, but very cute This was my first foray into the world of wide leg jeans (since the 90s anyway). These are cute & flattering. I gave 4 stars because they’re are not as comfortable (with no stretch) as some others I’ve tried but they look cute enough that I will tough it out & keep them!

A horrible representation of Levi Strauss Sorely disappointed in the poor quality!!!

I guess like everything else, Levi’s quality is declining. Having grown up in the 501 and Silver Tab era, Levi created a standard for which all other jeans have been compared against. Now, they are just another pair of jeans that won’t last.

If this is their “signature gold” product line, I think I will be off to find another brand. The fit is fine and the color is nice. True to size and fitted in the waist, hips and thighs, with a flattering straight leg transition. They are soft but the material is way too thin. The material is more like a pair of slacks than jeans. The pockets are dumb girl pants sized tiny pockets that cannot hold a phone and barely holds a small credit card sleeve wallet. When will manufacturers listen to women… we need real sized pockets so we can keep our stuff securely with us in public and our phones and wallets don’t pop out when we sit down!

I am usually a high rater but I am very disappointed in the decline in quality of Levi so I would give these a 2.5-3 star. Since Amazon doesn’t give half stars I am begrudgingly rounding up. I will reevaluate after a few washings and if they do not keep up, the rating will go down.

Bottom line… save your money and look for something more fitting for a “signature gold” product line.

Pretty good 140lbs | 5'3 | Waist : 28 inch | Hips : 40 inch

Im very picky when shopping. Im glad i landed on these jeans. Only complaints are that the middle seam looks odd and its not as stretchy as I had hoped, but the rest is great. Perfect size, medium comfortability, good sized pockets, and when i opened the package it smell smelled good like essential oils.
Good quality leggings love them Size down they run big but they are good quality leggings . I wanted a tight fit so I went from a  xl to L . Got a Large in light blue & dark blue ..perfect fit !!!

Everyday Jeans These jeans fit as expected from the size chart and are comfortable.  After washing the inseam on the 6P was 25 ½ inches, which is longer than the Laura Scott ones I used to buy. Bottom hems come to the top of my shoes, and are not so long that I’m stepping on them [I’m 5-1].  Washed well and went through the drier on the casual cycle.  Probably would not pass inspection by my fashion police nieces, but are a good choice when doing household and yard chores.  They have side pockets.  They don’t have back pockets and don’t have any metal studs.  I’m giving 4 stars because they do not have a choice of rise, and although the size 4 is on the chart, they aren’t listed as available.

too long, (way) too wide at the hips What I love about these jeans is that they truly are high-rise, straight-legged,  and fit me well around my waist. I'm 5'4" and weigh around 176, so I got a women's 20 petite.  What I dislike is that these seem to be made for a height of someone who is around 5'6". In addition, though perhaps it's hard to see here, the hips are way too large, and I doubt going down a size would make much difference. While I understand that these are to be relaxed fit, these are more like no-fit. Nothing like the photo in any case. Having said that, I know Lee is a good brand, it's hard to find black, high-rise jeans so I'm having them altered by having them taken up a good inch or so and having them taken in at a cost of around $35.00 (which really isn't too bad).

Not worth it 🥲 It's cute when your standing up. When you ait though they look really funny. They also have this distinct old people smell, sort of like mothballs. The fit is honestly too short, it fits well around my waist though. I'm 5'3" so it feels kinda funny saying their short. But it'd true. Color is exactly they same as the picture. Now I'm returning the pants because I feel like the cons outweighs the pros.
Great buy For the price these are a great value. They are basic jeans, fit exactly as I expected. They smell a little funny so I had to wash them but again, for the price, can't beat it.

Surprisingly Flattering and Comfortable I bought the dark wash and I’m honestly really impressed. For reference, I’m 5’3”, weigh about 161 lbs, and I’m 50 years old. I’ve always struggled to find jeans that fit properly without making me look bigger than I already feel. I have a short torso and longer legs, so jeans are usually a challenge for me.

I’m currently in a weight-loss phase, exercising and watching what I eat, so I didn’t want to invest in a whole new wardrobe. I just needed a few pieces that fit now and actually look appropriate and flattering. I’m also very picky and self-conscious about how I look, so it took a lot for me to even post vid/photos, but I’m hoping this helps someone else in the same boat.

I ordered a Size 10, and these fit EXACTLY how I wanted. They’re amazingly comfortable, well-proportioned, and don’t dig in. I even had leggings on underneath (it was cold today), and they still fit comfortably no struggling, no holding my breath. That alone sold me. The color is great, and while the material isn’t “Levi’s-level premium”, these jeans are far from cheap or scratchy. They’re soft, comfy, and feel like good everyday jeans. For the price, the quality is more than fair. Also follow the care instructions. These should be washed in cold water and dried on a low setting. If you take care of them properly, they hold up really well. A lot of fit and fabric complaints come down to not reading the care label.

Since these are discontinued colors, I’ll probably grab one or two more pairs, but that’s it. I’m not building a full wardrobe while I’m losing weight. For context, I was 167 lbs at the end of November and hadn’t bought anything for myself until now, so I’m really happy these fit and did more than just “the job.”

If you’re shorter, curvy, or in between sizes and looking for something comfortable and flattering without breaking the bank, these are definitely worth trying.

Great fit, Poor quality I’ve bought these jeans twice now, so I definitely have mixed feelings. I first ordered a size 16 because it said to go two sizes down from your regular size (I usually wear 18–20). The 16 fit so good — super flattering, hugged all the right places, and I felt really sexy in them!

But the problem is the quality. The first pair didn’t even last a month before it tore right in the crotch area. I decided to try again and went up two sizes (a 22), thinking maybe a looser fit would last longer. It did last a bit longer, but now I have to repurchase again.

Don’t get me wrong — the fit and look are amazing, especially the 16. I just wish the material was stronger. I know these are affordable jeans, but even my other jeans from Walmart (Lee brand) last me months or even years, and I wear those all the time.

So, overall — great fit, poor durability. I love how I look in them, but I’ll be saving them for occasional wear instead of everyday use

Comfy Jeans But Are They Shaping? I’ve been searching for a good pair of shaping jeans that didn’t cost an arm & a leg, so I was ecstatic when I found these! I ordered my normal size (8 short or 29/28).  They were the perfect length, which is hard for us short gals to find ;) When I tried them on they felt soft yet sturdy (like your fav most worn jeans you’ve had for years but thicker) they were a bit stiff with not a ton of stretch but I think that would change overtime. I do think the quality would ensure they last a decent amount of time as well.  However, the one downside I noticed immediately was that they did not seem to “shape” me in any way. Part of this may have been because the waist was lower than I expected. If I really hiked them up as high as I could they sat just below my belly button. The smoothing tummy panel is basically the inside flap where the pockets are (so it’s 2 separate pieces that make the panel) & doesn’t cover my whole tummy. Overall I feel like the waist area is like any other Jean & doesn’t seem to be very “shaping”.  I might try to order one size up to see if they’re more flattering as far as the shaping aspect, but otherwise I do plan to keep these jeans as they fit decently & because the overall quality of the jeans is good, plus I got them for a great deal, why not keep them?! I’ll update this review if the next size up seems to do better in the shaping department!

Great fitting jeans! Just about perfect! I am 5'5 and weigh about 130. I got the size 2 long based on other reviews and they are pretty great! I washed them prior to wearing them and the length did shrink a bit. That was my reasoning for ordering the long length based on others reviews of them being too short! They are soft and super comfortable not feeling tight or constricted even though they are flattering!

Very comfortable. I bought these because I would be traveling in a car for several days and wanted to be comfortable. I was very comfortable. I wore them for 4 straight days. I know that's a long time, but no one pointed to me and said " lady do you ever change your pants?". Very comfy walking on the Appalachian trail ( gotta brag as I'm 62yrs. young). As you see in photo the thread is a little loose. I'll just put a drop off clear nail polish or frey check on it for now instead of returning them. I did wash them when I got home inside out and air dried. They look fine. Size was good. I'm five' 5" feet and 130 pounds. I wore them with sandles as I was traveling from FL. to CO. Savannah, GE was wonderful!! If you go stay on the river in the Marriott with the balcony! Any way, these jeggings were great for travel. My daughter said they are good for old people like me. I took her out of my Will. Try these, you won't be disappointed.

Update! These jeggings hold up to falls!! I was running on loose rocks when my daughter's dog ( who is no longer in my Will ) cut me off and I fell. I was wearing my jeggings at the time. I landed on one knee and wrist very hard while landing on my side. My knee did not tear the jegging material yet my knee was cut and bruised. I fell hard, broke three toes, and injured my shoulder, but the jeggings are fine! There is just a little place where my knee hit the rocks that made the fabric a little lighter blue but not noticeable to not wear it again. I'm wearing an orthopedic boot for my broken toes for a few months, but I think the jeggings will look cute with the boot when I go to Maine to hike a little bit on the Appalachian Trail. I have good insurance. So again, I would recommend these, although I wouldn't recommend running on rocks with a large dog thinking it's playtime. And I question why would a husband ask "Are you O.K." when finding you bleeding and laying down on rocks?

BUY BUY BUY I ordered 2 more pairs! Honestly I have the WORST TIME finding jeans. I am 236lbs and 5’8’’ I have always had issues finding pants to fit. These are perfect and wish I could give more than 5 stars! Perfect suck in my tummy the length is good and the are comfortable and cute!

Great product, great price! These are a great product for a great price. They remind me exactly of the NYDJ. They have the same quality feel and look for less. They fit exactly the same and I ordered the same size. I am 5’7”, weigh 150lbs, 37” hips and I ordered a 4tall. They do stretch and they fit perfectly. They don’t get baggy and are so comfortable

The pant colors fits differently I loved the red one so much that I had to order in black and grey too. I ordered the red in XL, absolutely loved them so soft and stretchy, they did have quite a bit of stretch where I was pulling my pants up all day, I could even fit my arm in the waist. So when I decided to get them in black but in a large, but they are a bit more snug and much stretch to them, they actually give me a little muffin top. I ordered them in grey too and still waiting for them to arrive so I can’t say how they fit yet. I’m now worried they might be snug too. Im just going to return them and get the XL instead and deal with pulling my pants up throughout the day. I am a bit bummed though.

Great mid-rise fit. Wife’s review: true mid-rise. Almost one inch different than high-rise. Also 1/2 inch shorter in rise than the Ultra Lux Comfort mid-rise which is also comfortable but not as good for my body shape. 7” from above the button to the bottom edge of zipper seam. Ultra Lux Comfort mid-rise 7 3/4”.

Loose buttons I'm in my 50's, and have been wearing button, fly jeans since my teens. I tried on my pants as soon as they were delivered, and I noticed that every button was loose. I returned the jeans and ordered a replacement pair. When the second pair of jeans were delivered, I checked every button and they were all loose. I got the hammer and I tried to tap one of them in, my mom used to replace the buttons on our jeans every so often.So I knew what to do. They would not tap tighter. I took the jeans to a local tailor and they told me that the buttons were defective and they all needed to be replaced... Not sure.If i'm returning the second pair for a refund or just have the tailor replace the buttons. I would have given these 5 stars as the fit is perfect, the fabric is wonderfully soft.
Pretty darn good They fit well, material seems a little thin, but overall fits great.

LOOKING GOOD!! I've been working on getting some weight off and in between sizes. I needed a pair of jeans that fit well and were flattering and something I could dress up a bit. These are fabulous. DEFINITELY BUY!!!!!

They actually fit! They actually fit! I am shaped weird. I'm a petite from the waist up and I have a 32' inseam. I hate shopping. Because I work so much, I don't have time to run around to a bunch of stores. I sent 2 different pairs back. These fit correctly.

I’ve searched high and low for the perfect affordable wide-leg jean, and this is it. She’s that girl. These suck in the tummy, flatter the butt, and somehow still look effortlessly cool. Love these jeans, good quality, soft and true to size! I love these jeans! They are a good quality, soft and have a nice stretch, perfect to wear with my ankle boots. But I can't stand pants around my belly button so they have to go back. I bought size 2 straight leg mid-rise Lee jeans as well and the rise on those is pretty close to high rise as well, about a quarter inch lower than these. The Levi jeans are clearly a higher quality in the fabric is much nicer and softer than the Lee. So bummed that the rise on these is so high!

BIG in the waist!! ORDER A SIZE SMALLER!! B I G IN THE WAIST, good in the legs. Nice and long!! I INITIALLY ORDERED A MEDIUM/LONG BECAUSE I’M 5’10 154lbs . BUT THEY WERE STILL SO HUGE IN THE WAIST THAT THEY KEPT SLIPPING DOWN. I RETURNED THEM FOR A SMALL/LONG- it’s PERFECT!!

Seems like these pants were made more for someone who has a round core and thinner legs- BUT they are nice and long.

Seller sent me USED JEANS Jeans are nice but they're obviously used. They stink of Gain laundry detergent and the cloth tags and leather patch show obvious signs of washing. Thin material, soft and stretchy Not denim like I thought, but that’s on me I should have looked at the materials. Very stretchy and fits well. Looks nice. I’m 5’7, around 125 lbs, usually a 4-6 (3 months postpartum so I guessed and went with a size 6).

Great Fit for $15, but Fabric Varies by Color I’ve ordered three pairs of these Amazon Essentials Mid-Rise Stretchy Skinny Jeans (size 4 long) in black, light olive, and medium wash. For reference, I’m 5’5” and 120 lbs.

Pros:
I really like the mid-rise, it’s flattering in the front and comfortable to wear without constantly having to pull my pants up. The length is perfect for me, and the olive green and medium wash materials feel nice. They ride up a little on the calves, but that’s probably just me. The fit is snug but true to size, and they contour nicely without feeling restrictive. And for only $15 (at least when I bought them), they’re a great deal.

Cons:
The black pair is made of a completely different material that attracts lint and cat hair like crazy, and it bunches oddly in the crotch area (something the olive and medium wash don’t do). The medium wash also had a strong mothball smell that hasn’t gone away even after four washes, which is pretty frustrating.

Overall, I like the fit and comfort of the olive green and medium wash pairs, but the black ones are disappointing in terms of fabric and wearability. Still, for $15 a pair, they’re hard to beat!
First time buying jeans I am petite zise 4 fits perfect

Great jean! i like the material and would be worth the money just not for me
Must buy Cuteeee they fit true to size for me, I’m 112, 5’6 and I usually wear a 00 in jeans so a 24 fits perfect
