Finally jeans I don’t have to return! Love these! I’m 5’7” 145 lbs and ordered a size 6 Regular. They fit great and have just enough stretch to them. I like that they are long enough to wear a small heel or platform sneaker.

Finally jeans for ACTUAL tall people!!! Despite what most manufacturers believe, a 32” inseam is NOT “tall” or “long,” so I was skeptical about how long these would actually be. I was pleasantly surprised.

I am 5’11” / 185lbs / 82-83kgs, and initially ordered the 12 long, which ended up being long enough for my 34-35” inseam but too large/baggy in the butt. I reordered a 10 long and so far these fit great. Jeans have a tendency to stretch after a couple wears so we’ll see if they get baggy over time.

They hit the floor which is exactly where I like them to sit. I’ll fold the hem at the bottom and they will hover JUUUUUST above the floor when I’m wearing regular shoes — no ankle peeping but also no puddle dragging either.

Perfect blue I really like these and they were just what I was expecting. They are thin but that just means they are going to be perfect for warmer weather and they are not stiff. They stretch for my bloat days and are high waisted so very flattering for my body type. These are a perfect blue that I can pair with anything. I might order them in black too.

These are the best-fitting jeans in my entire wardrobe! I'm nearly 6' tall, and I have a 34" inseam which is nearly impossible to find. I have spent up to $100 on jeans from other stores to get a pair that are long enough, and they all have terrible gaps in the back. These Lee Meridian jeans over in the low $20 range and fit better than anything else I have bought at any price.

They have a bit of stretch to them and they do get just a bit looser after I've worn them for a bit. I bought my normal size, a 22L, and they are perfect for when I don't want to feel constrained. They did stretch, so I bought a 20L, which is what I have on in the video. They were a bit tight in the waist at first but quickly stretched enough to make them very comfortable, too.

These are not super-heavy denim; they are a bit lighter-weight, which I happen to love. I have 5 pairs of different Lee jeans in 3-4 different styles. I love them all, but these are my favorite!

Good for short men too. Might need to be hemmed. I’m a short man, on the best of days I am a staggering 5’5. I prefer women’s jeans because they have a lot more variety and I like my hips to be hugged in flares.
These jeans are pretty lightweight. They’re not heavy and I usually associate denim weight with quality. They do feel a bit flimsy but that’s because they have an incredible amount of stretch to them. I a 36-38 waist in men’s sizing and can fit into a 16. I bought both an 18 Short and an 16 Regular. The material feels soft and is okay for the price point. The jeans are so affordable that it if they do get destroyed you can just find another. There is no smell to the denim, they do not need to be washed straight out of the package (you shouldn’t wash denim often anyway).

I had to hem 4 inches of the bottom of the regular size to get the fit I wanted exactly. I will probably just order the short version next time.

The pictures with the silver/gold boots are hemmed. The pictures with the black boots are unhemmed (the size they came as out the package)

And a tiny hole in the upper pocket.. I would return but I already had took the tags off

Wrong Length and looked pre-used Well besides waiting almost 2 whole weeks for the jeans to actually ship out. I received the wrong length and the tags on the inside look like these have been worn before. But I can't wait another 2 weeks for work jeans. I am disappointed to say the least.
Hit and miss with the size Love the feel of the jeans. When the size is right, its nice and snug. Sizes arent the same though. Ordered two, both size 8, and there was an obvious difference.

Long vary in length three pair we’re all the same one was 2” shorter than I have bought several pairs all 8long. The ones I just received are an inch and a half to 2 inch shorter than the rest of the purchases.

Great!!!! These are my favorite jeans!  I have been going through the life change and have gone up 12 pounds and a full size.  I am sitting at 145, 5’2 - short torso.  These are a size 6 an really they fit perfect!

Great Cords & Color For Fall!! These corduroys are so cute! I got the Velvet Beet Cord color in size 2 short and they fit great! For reference, I'm 5'3", 109 lbs and have a 26.5" waist. These jeans are a great price and quality ! I absolutely love these jeans. Excellent quality for the money! Excellent quality for the money!  I love my new Jeggings - the white does NOT reveal my flaws like regular white leggings. Could be a tad bit longer Satisfied with my purchase, I wish the inseam was a bit longer for wearing heels. I’m a little taller than 5’7” height and I weight is 172 lbs. I ordered a size 14 long; the inseam on these jeans is 30-31 inches.

I said yes to the jeggings! So far I’m happy with these jeggings. They’re very stretchy with a good fit. It seems I don’t need to keep pulling them up which is a big plus. These are medium. I typically wear a 5 or 7 so true to size.

Best pair of jeans ever! Absolutely the best pair of jeans I’ve ever purchased! They’re durable, comfy, and they fit perfectly. I did size up, normally I’m a 10 but I hot a 12 based on the size guide and they’re perfect.

They have pockets! Love these! 5’4”, 115lbs, normally a size 2. Ordered size 2 and 4. Although the 2 fit, the inseam was shorter so I kept the 4 and I love them. They are so stretchy and comfortable.

Love These Pants! These pants are awesome and look exactly as pictured.  They are super comfortable because the fabric has some stretch to it, and they fit really well.  I could not be happier with this purchase.

Cute fall jeans. As soon as I pulled them out of the bag, I noticed how soft they were. Seems to be made with pretty good quality. They have a little stretch, which is nice. They’re so so with boots but super cute with trendy tennis shoes. I am 5’6 120 pounds and I bought the size 4 and they are a good fit.

Comfy and true fit They fit well and true to size.  Very comfortable.  They do stretch a tiny bit as you wear them.UPDATE: washed these jeans a handful of times with all like colors. Not sure why they came out of the washer like this and I was disappointed.I have two other pairs of this brand in blue jeans and none of them have done this.

Not squat proof but still great Perfect! We know black jeans do not fit like stretchy denim. I didn't want a "jegging" but these really are exactly what I was looking for. For reference I'm 5'6", 158-160lb, usually wear 6/7 jean or medium. I got these in a medium. I would size down but they don't really pass the squat test (see-through). Otherwise they're perfect. I'd definitely buy again.

table talk: 27w 32l fits the same as a 28 abraided art ones, BUT they are both “32” in length , but this is a whole inch or so longer. Fits like a 33 length I think.
they also feel a little highter on my stomach than the lighter pair like right below my belly button.

“Super low” but I wouldn’t call either of these jeans a true low rise.
I do love them they they are comfortable.

New Age JNCO’s that fit great! Updated Review (2025.12.09) - I ordered 3 pairs—dark wash, regular wash and khaki. Out of the 3, I kept the dark wash (pics 4&5) and returned the other 2. While the leg opening is larger than the waist, it’s not as extreme with the dark wash.
I will say these are very comfortable and provide just the right amount of stretch, and did not stretch out at the end of the day. If you have a lower belly pooch, these will cover/slim you but if you eat anything, you’ll definitely feel these being tighter (due to hitting right below the belly button).

I am 5’4”, 140lbs and the 26x32 fit like a glove, but I do need to either wear platform shoes or shoes with a small (1”) heal (I’m wearing wedges in pics 4&5), otherwise, they drag the ground.

As much as I love wide leg jeans, these are giving me mid-90’s JNCO vibes. I love the fit as they have stretch, good fit in the waist and thighs and sits just below belly button but no plumbers crack); sadly, since the leg opening is wider than the waist, I am returning these.

Perfect pant Perfect size length and comfort
Stretchy waistband helps with the fluctuation of the month in a woman’s body

Best Wide-Leg Jeans I’ve Owned. Comfortable, Flattering & Booty-Approved These are hands down my favorite wide-leg jeans right now.

For reference, I’m 5’4”, 127 lbs, wearing a size 24, and the fit is excellent. They sit comfortably at the waist, are fitted through the hips and thighs, and then fall into the perfect wide leg. No pulling, no stiffness, and no awkward bunching.

The fabric is SO soft with just the right amount of stretch. They feel broken-in right out of the package, which is rare for denim. I can wear these all day without feeling restricted, and they keep their shape really well.

One of the biggest surprises is how flattering they are in the back. I have a flatter bottom (so I don’t say this lightly), and these actually give shape and lift without feeling tight or compressive.

The soft black wash is rich and versatile, easy to dress up or down. I’ve worn them with boots, heels, and sneakers, and they work with everything. They instantly make an outfit look polished and intentional.

If you’re looking for wide-leg jeans that are comfortable, flattering, and actually wearable for real life, these are a must-buy. I’d absolutely repurchase.

Nice fitting comfortable stretchy jeans with quality fabric and stitching 5'7", 115 lobs, 28 w 30" inseam; bought small/long and they fit me perfectly.

Love the color and slightly "worn" look - excellent fabric weight that is not at all transparent.

Great stretch and very soft. Fabric is thicker like regular jeans but not heavy, and not thin like some jeggings.
Opaque fabric for those of us who are modest, but cotton/poly/elastane blend is breathable and comfortable.

NO SMELL which is super important to me. Labels says made in India and I've often gotten clothing made there that smells skunky. These only have typical new clothing smell and I always wash new clothes before wearing.

Not sure what the front "tummy control" panel on the inside is all about. Seems rather pointless to me.

Why only 4 stars rather than 5:

The so-called tummy control is a stretchy nylon piece barely stitched into the inside of the jeans which actually shows through a little if you look closely.

You can see by the photos that the hip area bells out a little bit. I remember back in the late 70s/early 80s slacks often had that feature in women's sizes and I called them saddle bags. I don't have much of a figure so this part "bags out" a tiny bit on me. There's also a bit of slack just below my rear end. Again, I don't have much of a butt so if you're a normal sized girl this may not be an issue. I'm hoping when I wash them this will smooth out a bit.

Pockets in front and zipper placket are non-functional. Don't really see the point of that either. The back pockets are not very deep. Personally, I wouldn't feel comfortable putting a wallet or phone in them as they are too shallow and risk of falling out might be an issue. The dreaded toilet phone bath...

Overall, they are very nice jeans, I'm happy with the purchase and would buy them again. In fact, I think I did buy a pair similar to this years ago on Amazon. Price for the quality is very good.

Cleo the Grey is a very curious girl. And likes a selfie.

Update: after washing, the jeans did not shrink at all. Still fit like a glove. Unfortunately the "saddlebag puckers" and under-bottom wrinkles did not go away. Leaving at 4 stars. Ladies with hips and butts will probably be better suited for this style.

Attract pet hair like no one’s business Fit wise these are OK, maybe a little bit small and a little long in the leg. I’m 5’6” and about 200# and an apple. I bought a size 14 regular.  I tend to carry a lot of my weight in my belly.  The rise on these are just a little bit short for me. They are hitting right at my hip bones and giving me a total muffin top. There’s a decent amount of stretch in the legs, but not really in the waistband. I just took these out of the package and I know I have three dogs, but the bottoms of the pants have attracted like all the pet hair in the house in about 30 seconds. Too many little things for me to keep them so back they go. I will say they make my butt look good though.

So comfy and cute!! I’m 5’8” about 175, my waist is about 30” and I like a 32” inseam when I wear my cowboy boots.
I ordered size 10. Right out of the bag, I like the stack of these jeans on my boots, wearing a flat shoe, like my sambas id def have to roll up(like the old days😉) I really hope they don’t shrink too much because the length, for me, is perfect. I was driving in the car for about 20 min and I didn’t feel like I was being suffocated in my waist, even tho they’re a bit tight, the stretch really helps in this area. Alll in all these are legendary jeans and I love them for how cheap they were and the fact I didn’t have to get off my couch to buy them. Highly recommend.

Great Buy! Love these Jeans and I'm very very picky These jeans are so comfortable and I love the stretch and softness of them. The quality is great and they're very durable. I've had them about a couple weeks now and they're unfortunatly the only jeans I have that fit me right now. I bought another brand of Jean and I washed them and they literally fell apart so I had to return those. I gained 53 Lbs in a month and a half since getting cut off from Ozempic. I've always had problems with my weight but these jeans are perfect! Also they don't shrink because they're not 100% cotton. Definitely great value for the money. I plan to buy a couple more pair in the next couple months. I'll have to so I have jeans that Fit me until I can get back into my other jeans. I inserted a Pic of the other jeans I bought that fell apart after getting washed once. I didn't even get to wear them except for the 5 min I tried them on. They ARE NOT THESE JEANS. Just be careful who you buy from and what brand you get! I always stick to my Levi's!

Comfortable fit, true to size I love these! I was dreading ordering jeans online and dealing with trying to figure out sizes and fits. These were PERFECT! I am 5’4 about 155 and ordered a 10. I’m big in the thigh/but so usually it’s an absolute pain to find jeans that fit the curves just right, but these do! The length is just right for my height but I could see someone wanting to get a ‘long’ if they’re a bit taller. The stretch is just right in these and the color was as expected. I feel like I could comfortably work in them and also dress them up to wear out. This will be my new go-to jean!

For the petite women/girls They’re not bad, but the button is definitely really cheap quality. I’m 5’2 110lbs, they fit my waist wonderfully but look kinda baggy everywhere else. I want to love them but they’re meh. They work. The color is great, they’re comfortable, I just wish they came in an xs size. I probably wouldn’t buy them again unless they were available in smaller sizes.

Flattering thick jeans. I'll start by saying these run large. I had to size down 3 times. The length is 30" which is not my preference but I can always hem it. I am an European 36 (I rather stick to this conversion since those sizes don't fluctuate) and I ended up with a 25 on these. It took me 3 pairs to finally figure it out. I'm 5'4" and 143 lbs. The waist can be a little uncomfortable when sitting down but these are not "sit down" jeans lol.
Love how much it flatters my derriere. Amazing quality. Only reason I'm giving 4 stars is for the misleading sizing.

Jean that feel like leggings These are extremely comfortable. They feel just like yoga pants but look like jeans.

I’m 5’5 and I’m wearing the medium. I find they are a little on the shorter side compared to the large (which I also tried on) but I liked the fit of these better. I rather jeans be too long than too short, so that is really my only complaint.

I also bought these in a lighter pair that is sometimes available and I love that pair as well. Great for everyday wear if you want to be comfy but hate the way jeans normally feel.

SUPER long I loved that these pants are 99% cotton 1%spandex.
Got size 14 for my 32-33” waist, 41” hips

I hate how long they are and the flare is WAY too flared for my taste.

I am 5’5” 160lbs

Would have been nice if… Beautiful jeans. The fit around my hips and abdomen is perfect, I chose the right size. I’m 5.4, 190 lb, size XL.
Only the legs of the jeans crease all over. It’s annoying, they don’t have a smooth covering. I couldn’t go with a smaller size, my belly wouldn’t have fit. Might be my legs are thinner than my upper body. Probably. Unfortunately the overall look is messy. On my body.
They have lots of stretch, comfortable to move, I like them. But the the creases.
Good fit Love these. I am 5’7 135. They are just wide enough. I thought they’d be a little w but wider in the leg but otherwise I’m happy w them !

5’2”? These pants are not for you They are a cute cut. They are super dark and would be great for work. *If you’re short, the regular length will be too long. I’m 5’2” and 120lbs. I ordered the 27 waist *the short length version was not available. I could have gone a waist size down from my normal jeans. These seem to run large and long.

Beware ! Loved these but BEWARE!!! I had these for a year and possibly used them less than 10 times both sides were the back pockets are created a hole. Contemplating on ordering again because I did love these cause they are high waisted. But super disappointed

Good quality. I have a big belly with a small butt and legs. This fits my legs and my waist, really hard to find. Usually if I. An button the jeans they are loose on my thighs. Better quality material than American eagle jeans. Firm jean feeling, they also have stretch, and the wash is nice. I am 5 5 and 230 carring most weight above my waist. So of course it cuts at my belly but they overall look good. I am a size 16 and they are true to size. The button below my belly button. Will update how they hold up to being worn all day.

Update:
Pants are comfortable. I do find myself pulling them up alot. The stitching on the waist has a rough feel. I had to put on a tank top for a barrier. Washing them didn't help this go away. After washing the still fit the same. They didn't seem to loosen up as I wore them through the day. I would still recommend them. Maybe more of a 3 or 4 out of 5.

Great jeans! The fabric color is true to the picture and they are a thick material! These jeans are incredibly stretchy and are long enough for tall girls! (5’8”) They are also accurately listed as high waisted and come up above my belly button, unlike most of the other jeans I’ve tried.

I look soooo slim in these! I love these jeans! I did not expect them to fit so well. The color is really nice, I can’t describe it but these jeans just snatch! Make my mommy tummy looks so good. I seriously want more colors.
Love them! love these and great value! the stretchy feel is nice … true to size

Comfortable, Stylish, and Perfectly On-Trend Wide-Leg Jeans I’m a big fan of Dokotoo’s clothing, and these high-waisted wide-leg jeans did not disappoint! The quality is fantastic, with a soft, stretchy denim fabric that allows for easy movement whether sitting, squatting, or walking.  The jeans have a nice weight to them.  At 5’3”, the length hits me perfectly with shoes, no dragging or walking on the back hem, though taller ladies might find these to be ankle ankle-length.  I am slowly losing weight and down to 165 and I have been starting to wear a size 10.  I purchased the size 10, prayed that they would fit when I was putting them on and they went up with no problems whatsoever.The wide-leg silhouette is super fashionable right now, and they’re incredibly comfortable to wear throughout a busy day. No rushing to change out of them after work thats for sure.  These jeans blend style and coziness beautifully. Great fit, great feel, and definitely a wardrobe staple this fall.

Great jeans definitely recommend. Jeans great color and feel, meaning a real denim not fake stretch material. Just size too big & they run little long. Am going to get another pair size smaller. Only reason 4/5 stars looks like worn before w/ tags. They somehow looked like taped on in a way. But whatever their great jeans definitely recommend.

Tall Girl Flare PERFECTION 5’10” long legs, super high waist, fluctuating weight from current breast cancer battle=finding classic, sexy denim an absolute impossibility (if y’all could see my Amazon return back & forth you’d cackle with incredulity)! After reading the reviews, I closed my eyes & pulled the trigger on this size 10 purchase without a lot of expectation. So thrilled I did. The dark wash is first-class & timeless, the material not only comfy & forgiving, it keeps my lil tummy reigned in and gifts me a sassy lifted booty. I stepped off the scale at 156lbs the day I ordered these and after a week in the hospital and some medication tweaks I’m a chunk at 173 today. They still fit & I’ll be rocking them along with a Carolina Tarheel cropped sweater & some Air Force 1’s at a cool Southern Saturday ACC football tailgate/game with my HandsomeHuzzbend! This price point and pair of jeans won’t disappoint, do it!

Soft, great stretch, perfect flare! These jeans have such a soft  and comfortable fabric that still have durability to them with the perfect amount of stretch! Zipper zips easily. The color is classic. I am 5'3 and about 145lbs and the 6 short are perfect. I have decent curve to my backside and I love how these fit like a glove and don't leave that awkward gap at the back waist. They fit right to the back of the waist nicely. The value is at a great price for the beautiful quality. I actually bought a different pair in an upscale retail store with abbreviation BHWM, and I plan to return them since these are more comfortable and look even better for a better price. The bootcut is the perfect amount of flare to give a nice shape and elongate the look of the legs. I'm going to check out other jeans from Flying Banana since I love these so much.
True to size Very cute & true to size. Ordered sz 8, I'm 140 & 5'11. They fit more like ankle pants on me because of my height but still cute!

Cute and nice fit Very cute and looks exactly like the picture! A nice stretchy material. I'm 5'2 and around 180lbs and wear a 33 in Levi's, I got a size 14 and it's a good fit. A little more snug but I was looking for more fitted. Only complaints I have is the smell, it has a strong odor. Maybe a chemically smell? And I was going to just wash it and see if it washed out but it said hand wash only which is a little inconvenient. Eventually i did wash it and the smell is still there. I purchased them for horseback riding so the smell isn't a deal breaker. But they did hold up well for that!
Ordered womens petite received Misses These were a gift.  I'll keep these and reorder a larger size hopefully I don't get Misses again quality of material is excellent.

Comfy with Stretch but May Cause Excessive Wrinkling. Very Comfy with Stretch but causes excessive wrinkling on my legs. I have somewhat thin legs but the pants still bunched up. Its worse when I've been sitting and stand up.  If I pull the pants up so that they sit very high just above my belly button, the stretch isn't as bad but as you can see in the second photo, that will cause a camel toe, so I need to wear a long top over them.  Even with all that, I have to say they are very comfortable and will wear them around the house and with tall boots. I'm 5'3" about 138lbs and purchased a regular medium and the length and waist are otherwise perfect.

Comfy & good length for shorter build These are comfortable but not the most flattering jeans. I’m shorter so I was grateful the length was perfect. (I typically have to get jeans/pants hemmed so appreciate not having to do that for these.)

I’m keeping them to wear doing chores, walking the dogs, etc. — but I can’t see wearing these to go to a concert etc.

Surprisingly Good I'm honestly surprised that these turned out to be a good purchase so far. The material is a bit thin but it's NOT too stretchy, and it still feels like real jeans. They do fit snug and just right. So for me it was true to size. AND THERE'S REAL POCKETS.
If you wear a large, I would size up the extra large They’re the correct pants and they fit stretchy around the thigh area.

Where are the tags and original packaging? This pants came with NO tags as if it was returned before. The pants did not seem new in its original packaging. It came rolled up in generic plastic wrap. I added the picture to show how it came folded or rolled up . I wish I still had the plastic "shrink wrap" , but it got it got gathered up in the discarded packaging from the other Amazon purchases that had received . I opened I tried the pants on because I really need warm clothing for the crazy South Florida winter temperatures we have been experiencing so I was desperate to get this. I found it tacky not seeing any tags and then wrapped in plastic with clear packing tape? Yes. I hoped it would fit but this size 18 is tight in the waist and hips. Not what I am used to with size 18. Maybe it was mis-sized? Anyway, I am returning this pant. Maybe if there were a "size 20" I would order.
Good points:
length was perfect , fabric is good quality, there is stretch which is great for a good fit.

total trash, tear like tissue paper, zippers still don't work NOT WORTH A SINGLE DOLLAR EDIT BELOW
i thought my expectations were low, but these jeans surprised me by being even worse than i imagined. cheap is cheap but since when is that an excuse to sell trash for real money. zipper and button are oxidized weirdly and the zipper doesn't function properly, the fabric is stiff and rough in all the wrong ways, the legs are way too baggy around the calves, and if one single drop of water touches these things you get an extremely noticeable dark spot till it dries. also they wrinkle? like crazy??? just from wearing them???? i don't know how these legally count as jeans. they earned a whole extra star because they don't seem like they'll fall apart the moment i wash them. fingers crossed!

EDIT I SPOKE TOO SOON!!!
these absolute garbage sacks ripped apart the first time i wore them. let me stress, they are two sizes too big for me, because i wanted them loose, so imagine if they'd been tight. the fly ripped in half when i pulled them up and then the entire ass ripped out when i got up from an easy chair. THEY LITERALLY MADE THAT CARTOON RRRRRRRIP SOUND LIKE THIS IS SPONGEBOB! completely unbelievable. i have attached photos of the devastation. this has literally never happened to me before. i want my money back because they sold me worthless trash and on principle because they shouldn't get away with it

LOVE these!!! LOVE LOVE LOVE these!!! I’m a 44 year old mom of teenagers trying to branch out from my skinny jeans. They are amazingly comfortable.  I’m 174lbs 5”5 1/2 and a 13 is perfect and they stretch. Highly recommend.

My favorite! My favorite jeans i own! i usually wear a 4 in Hollister jeans but got the 6 short in these and they are my best fitting pair ive ever gotten. the material is not stretchy but not restricting.

Great jeans for petite gals, dress it up or down I don’t usually wear jeans, more of a leggings kinda gal but thought I’d be more trendy and try these out. For reference I am 5’1” 118lbs, kinda apple shaped, and no junk in my trunk. These fit perfect! They have a little stretch to it and were not to long for my height. I can wear them with Chuck’s or a short heel to class it up. Love this purchase.

Great fit, super comfortable I am 5’0” and 124. I got a size 8. These pants are so comfortable and well fitted. They are too long on me, but not by much, and honestly most pants are too long on me. I love the detail of the side panel. Great for a millennial diving back into wide leg pants!

Perfect fit and bagginess - but they stain white shoes if not washed first! Baggy jeans are in and as a 28 year old trying to keep up with the trends, these pants are my perfect balance of baggy and tight! I am 5 ft 6 in, around 120lbs, and bought the size 26 regular and they fit well. It sits a bit below the belly button, is form fitting on the butt, but loose down the leg. For the length, it doesn’t drag on the floor.

My sister also bought a pair and be warned, you have to wash these jeans alone for 1-2 cold cycles to remove the dye. She wore them with white sneakers before washing, and by the end of the day they were stained blue!!

Strong chemical smell. Size and fit are great, however it arrived with a bunch of weird thread in the pockets, that makes it seem like the quality might not be the best, and a strong chemical smell that’s still not gone after 4 washes.
Decent jean, good stretch i guess it fits fine just need a little more length … not for me

True to size Great jeans. I’m 5’5 & they fit well. True to size!
Ordered a size 10 & love them. Very fitting feel but still has stretch. Do recommend!

Nice fit. Nice material. Too long. Very nice fit - especially for pull-on pants. Material feels like lightweight jeans. I am 5’3” and 185 lbs in the pictures. Very comfortable. I haven’t washed the yet so I don’t know how they will fit after washing. I gave them only 4 stars because they are too long for flats so I will have to hem them. So far, good purchase for the price.

Sizing & Fit has changed The sizing & fit has changed. This was my 3rd order of the same item, size & color, unfortunately things have changed beyond just the tag on the back. Sizing is smaller, shorter & tighter and therefore overall feels & looks different. Even the ankle opening is smaller. Considering my other 2 have been washed & dried many times and my overall weight is down some, these are definitely smaller & shorter than the prior 2 pairs. The darkets pair on the left is this purchase

I'm 5'7" 145# and I ordered size 8 Long.

Going to reorder to see if perhaps this pair is just a one off, but might try a size up as well. Have really liked these jeans, hopeful to get the right ones.

high waist bold bootcut/Willow mid I wore these wrangler high waist bold bootcut about 5 times and there is a rip at the edge of the pocket where it is sewn on the pants.
Update 4/24/25
I ordered the Wrangler Willow Mid Rise Boot cut Ultimate Ridding Jean to replace the ripped ones. I have worn these since December, 5 days a week doing farm chores and at my regular manufacturing job. I love these jeans! I will stick with this cut going forward.

Not “tapered” Very comfortable. I have multiple pairs, either size 10 or 12. I gave it 4 stars because it totally differs from my definition of tapered. I expected something a little close fitting in the legs as the picture shows. Reality is not “tapered.” It is loose.

Love the stretch! A few minor problems for me I'm 55 years old, 5'8" tall, 180 pounds and the size 12 fit good, but there were a few things that bothered me. They are slightly long, coming to the very bottom of the heel on my snow boots. If you're a little taller than me they should be perfect in length. They are a little tight around my knees, and the more I wear them it is bugging me a little bit. It's manageable though because they are a stretch material. They do have a boot cut at the bottom which is wonderful, because I like my jeans to flare a little bit. I think these would look great on a gal who wears western boots. I feel like at times I have to pull them up in the back, but I've always had trouble finding jeans that fit me perfect. Between the knees tight and pulling them up in the back, they're not my favorite pair, but I'm keeping them because they stretch. I can wear them out to eat or something. They just won't be my go-to pair.

Feels like expensive jeans I weigh 192 and got size 12 and they fit perfectly! They are super comfy but yet has a thick material that is stretchy! I will be buying in more colors. Perfect value that exceeds the cost!

Not short girl friendly I sized up after all the reviews and I’m glad I did. I’m just under 5’2” and was thrilled when they had short lengths until I read the reviews. It’s still super long but with my 4” wedges they fit almost perfectly. But I want to wear them with comfy shoes so I may shorten them by at least 2-3 inches. Other than that they fit great. Sturdy material and not too much give so it keeps all my jiggles in place. I gave it a 4 due to the length not being a true “short”.

I love this jeans Amazing!!! A bit short since I am 5.10 but the fit, the comfort, the colour are amazing! Absolutely recommend this jeans. And yes, they are running slightly smaller but if you’re for example, between size 27 and 28, you will be able to fit 27 which was my case.

Great Trendy Jeans Great fitting waist. Not too small. Has enough stretch to fit a size up or down. Currectly Size 12, bought Size 10 for inseam and the fit is perfect. Light weight so not sure of how it will last, but washed and tried well.

Awesome jeans for the tall ladies! Awesome jeans! I’m 150lbs, 5’9” and I bought the 8 long- they were perfect! They’re very comfortable, soft material, and good stretch. I definitely recommend these jeans for the tall girls!
Birthday pants Very comfortable. I ordered a 2x and they fitted perfectly.

Stitching is coming off after first wash 😭 I have so many Levis. This specific style fits great, even after just having a baby. I was so excited to be comfortable in jeans again! Then I washed them for the first time and bam... the pocket stitching ripped and now theres a whole. I dont even use the pockets in my jeans. Im so disappointed because its so obvious and is only going to get worse.

4 stars but returning due to size My sizing basics, to start:

I am apple/heart-shaped (broad shoulders)
Height 5'6" (170 cm)
Weight 125 lbs (about 9 st.)
Breast 36" (B-cup) (91 cm)
Waist 30" (76 cm)
Hips 36" (94 cm)

I bought two variations:
Gloria Vanderbilt Women's Amanda Classic High Rise Tapered Jean, Madison wash, 6 average
and
Gloria Vanderbilt Women's Amanda Classic High Rise Tapered Jean, Portland Wash, 4 Average

They were both too large for me.
I could pull both of them up over my hips while they were zipped and buttoned, so that means wayyy too big. I'm not remarkably sized in any area except my shoulders, so I was a bit shocked at how large these were on me.
The cut was tapered, supposedly, but still really wide at the calves.

Size 4 picture attached.

I didn't take a photo of the 6 before returning.

The material wasn't terribly heavy, but lightweight denim due to the stretch capability (which I hate but can hardly ever find any that don't have elastane or similar materials). Stitching seemed well made.

Not for tall girlies Very cute and comfortable with a little stretch, however if your taller girl like me (5’8)  they don’t offer longer inseams. I kept them and they will work with flat shoes at least.

They just dont fit me right I am 5'1" and about 118 lbs and after reading reviews I settled on size 6. The jeans are overall very comfortable and really good quality but a bit baggy around my knees and waist, and they do that weird ruffle thing when I sit. Ordered these for an interview and they didnt come in time so will be returning.

Good pants I got these in a M and a L to see which size fits me best.  The M was sluggish which my the made the belt loops pull and slat and the back hung too low for me (big butt gal😜). The L was great it was fitted well, enough room in the back, and the length of the pants was good.  Though after wearing them they did get a little loose. The material is good, they are comfortable, they are a good value for the money, there wasn't a smell. I didn't like that there are no front pockets only back pockets. Sorry that mirror was soo dirty. 😅

Good quality, size, and length These are a little looser in the legs than the product pictures suggest, but not so loose to be bothersome. I would prefer the length about an inch shorter for petite, but they don't drag too badly. Overall, good color and fit. Comfortable.

Beautiful Corduroy Pants The teal pants are a great color. Just what I wanted. They come from Lee so they’re well made with pockets, belt loops, and a button and zipper closer. They also have a bit of stretch so they’re very comfortable.  I absolutely love them. My only complaint is that they are too big because the size guide is incorrect. Based on my measurements, from the guide, I chose a size 18 short. I usually wear a 14 or 16. The length is perfect but the waist is very big. I was fine with how they fit in the hips until I wore they around a little with a belt.  Once they warmed up they stretched out more and I ended up with saggy crotch. I’m sure you all hate that as much as I do. I’m going to order a size 16 and hope for the best. Unfortunately, they don’t have them in a short but those are hard to find. I still highly recommend them, just maybe size down from the guide or stick to your true size.
Soft & comfy Love these!  So soft and comfy!  Love the elastic waistband and pockets too. I usually wear 10/12 & ordered a Large.

Can't even try them on because the buttonhole is too small to unbutton them I reached out to Amazon, was directed to Lee.  Sat waiting on an agent for ages before sending them an email.  I have no idea how long it will take to finally hear back.  My only guess is that someone noticed the wonky buttonhole during some sort of half-hearted QA and decided to add an extra stitch or two.  The jeans cannot be unbuttoned so all I ended up with was jeans I can't wear, a run around, and a few shredded fingernails from trying in vain to unbutton them in hopes of salvaging my purchase.

Great jeans! I LOVE these jeans!! They are the perfect weight, length and are very comfortable.  When I wear them I receive numerous compliments. These are first jeans that I have ordered from Amazon that fit coming out of the package.

Cute but not for me I like the baby blue color & they're well made, soft, thin. They just don't fit my body right I guess. The style is like the Time & True Walmart jeggings . But these are a little thinner. & overpriced.
I'm 168 & 5'4 & got the medium. It fits well, a little long but it didn't look good & gave camel toe status as well.
The top waist band has a 1 inch elastic in it so it's not creating the instant muffin top since its wider. No tummy support. They look like real jeans. Front & back pockets are real.

Not exact I just got my jeans and although I really like them, they are not exactly like the picture,they are not a washed look and are not mid rise, they are high rise, some people say they are short but Iam 5’9 and the legnth is perfect.

Will be ordering in different colors Beautiful pants,nice stretch easy to move around in. Fit perfectly since I am losing weight. Soft to touch and the packaging didn’t smell at all. Held on to my perfume and body care all night

Obsessed! BUT Amazon needs more stock of the 30” length!! LOVE these black jeans. I’m a millennial and still not down for the full baggy pants so these are the perfect wide leg for me. I love how fitted they are in the glutes and they’re the perfect amount of high rise for me. They are so flattering! They are stretchy and very comfortable. The black material does collect a little more lint than I hoped, but it’s not bad. I actually returned the pair I bought on Amazon because I needed the shorter length (which I bought on Levi’s website). I ended up loving the 25 waist x 30 length - I’m 5’2” and 118 lb. Worn with heeled boots in the photo but could wear with sneakers too. The regular length sold on Amazon covered my heeled boots but the 30 was perfect for my height!
Lee jeans The Lee jeans are nice and not too long for a short person like myself
This leg is not a skinny fit. The leg size does not coincide with the actual product.

Nice jeans 👖 For being a 5’8 girly, these look good on my legs ! Nice material too and can dress up with a nice top or keep casual. Never bought wrangler jeans before, they are comfortable, somewhat stretchy but fitting.

Great Jeans but on shorter side I think these jeans are great and are made just as well as those you find in department stores. Material has medium thickness, is soft and has right amount of stretch making them very comfortable. Only downside is the length and color. Black is not a true black and has variations of gray throughout. Length is shorter than a 32 inseam.  I’m almost 5’10 and they were slightly below my ankle and this was prior to washing.  For reference 185lbs and purchased a 12 which fit perfectly except for the length.Product came well packaged and didn’t contain a smell.
Very good qualitie Very nice

NOT tummy control and poor quality I got these because the name says “tummy control” but these have no control at all. They’re extremely stretchy/comfy so I’ll give them that but not at all flattering and in my opinion they’re super thin and don’t hold anything in place the way I was hoping for. Of course they only ever model the pants on size 0 so I had no clue what to expect. The button is very poorly sewn on, extremely loose, and looks like it’s missing a piece. I’ll be returning these.

For reference I’m 5ft 230lbs and usually wear a size 16 and I ordered an XL per their size chart
Not for 5’8” or taller… These are great for anyone that’s short.. I’m 5’8” and these are inches above the ground

Pants for the entire family:) These black jeans are such a good fit! Soft stretchy and ohhh so comfortable that my  two daughters and myself bought the same pair.. same size too. 😊I might buy another pair in a different color!
Buen pantalón pero me quedo corto De ancho excelente, de largo se quedó corto :( me quedan muy cortos abajo. Lástima solo tiene talla de cintura y no de largo

Super cute and stylish Size-true, Length- good for me at 5'6 with long legs and 146 lbs. I bought a large. Material is not sweat pant, more of a thinner stretch pant. Comfortable and cozy. Look like real jeans. I always wash before I wear. No terrible smell people have been writing about. I definitely recommend. But don't expect them to be thick sweatpants.

LOVED Them So Much I Bought More! I recently purchased a pair of Gloria Vanderbilt Faded Stretch Jeans, and I must say, I am thoroughly impressed with the quality, fit, and style of these jeans. They have quickly become my go-to choice for both comfort and fashion.

First and foremost, the fit of these jeans is fantastic. The stretchy fabric ensures a comfortable and snug fit that moves with me throughout the day. I appreciate that they have just the right amount of stretch without losing their shape. They sit comfortably at the waist and provide a flattering silhouette that I love.

The faded design adds a stylish and trendy touch to the jeans. It gives them a chic, vintage-inspired look that's perfect for various occasions. Whether I'm dressing them up with heels and a blouse or going for a more casual vibe with sneakers and a tee, these jeans are incredibly versatile.

The overall construction and durability of these jeans are exceptional. They feel well-made, and I can tell they are designed to withstand daily wear and tear. The stitching and detailing are top-notch, ensuring that they will last in my wardrobe for a long time.

The choice of available sizes and inseam lengths is a real plus. It's easy to find the perfect fit, and the various inseam options mean that I can get the length just right. This attention to detail in sizing ensures that these jeans cater to a wide range of body types and preferences.

Maintenance is a breeze with these jeans. They wash well and maintain their color and shape. I've been pleased with how they've held up, even after multiple washes.

In conclusion, Gloria Vanderbilt Faded Stretch Jeans have quickly become my favorite pair of jeans. They offer a winning combination of style, comfort, and durability that's hard to beat. Whether you're looking for jeans to wear to work, on a night out, or for everyday comfort, these jeans fit the bill. I couldn't be happier with my purchase, and I highly recommend them to anyone in search of stylish and comfortable denim. They are a true wardrobe staple that you'll reach for again and again!

More like ankle jeans for me I ordered the size 8 that has a 30” inseam. I’m 5’ 5.5” and about 139#. I wouldn’t say I have long legs; my legs and torso are proportional for my height. These jeans fit more like ankle length as you can see in the photos. I am returning them and am debating whether I should buy the long length to see if they fit better.

not a lot of stretch, but still fit! They are great! I am writing a review because I was very nervous they wouldn’t fit my thighs/butt (I am 5’3, 155 lbs)  but they did! I ordered a size 28 and they are definitely the tightest at my thighs, and took some stretching to get on, but I think they look really great. Obviously they are classic, 100% cotton, not technically for curvy girls. Therefore, I was not surprised that they felt a little stiff around my thighs because they are the biggest part of my body. My only complaint is that they are a little short (I am only 5’ 3”). They are not super high waisted.

Not good quality this time!! I always love this jeans..been getting them all the time but after I already used it ..I notice what I thought it was a spot on the fabric..thinking when I washed it will be gone but not is a defect on the material..and also the button broke after 2 use..I didn’t return it sine I already wear it.not happy this time!!

Nice leggings.. So I ordered these in L and XL to cover my bases…L worked. Needed one pair to wear the next day.
I’m 5.6” and @163lbs for reference. I liked they weren’t skin tight. They come above my ankle bone. But that’s okay come spring time with little flats.
Fabric is nice. Not too thick nor too thin. Denim feeling and looking. Will work nice with shirt tails long enough to cover the rear end and front. At 70 I like to appear respectful looking.
XL would’ve been fine except just large enough around top to feel sloppy. I liked the looser leg though in XL.
I have a dark denim pair I bought. Think I’ll buy a few more of different colors.
Ohh…I washed them on tap cold water. And hung them to dry…rarely if ever do I run clothes through dryer. They last and hold up longer not being beat up in dryer.

I think they could fit absolutely anyone Edit on edit: Well I notice quite a few ppl at work wear these jeans and they mold (mould?) to every body type. One woman has that round booty tiny waist, another wide hips, skinny legs, another average. Looks great on all. The darker color is a tad more rough and stiff. And there is a slight chemical smell (the dye?) Edit: I have since bought several colors and sizes and even bought a size 2. Since there is stretch they get loose throughout the day. 2 is perfect. A little tight at first, but they loosen. So I’d consider going down your normal size idk.
Since skinny jeans are out and I’m too old for the baggy grunge look wanted straight leg jeans. Happened to see on IG and tried them. Love em. The light color is perfect for spring and cold summer days as the fabric is on the lightweight side. Def not thick lucky jeans or gap, and not as closely knitted or buttery as Paige. Has a very slight course feel to the touch. Almost as comfy as pjs because of the stretch and thinness. The stretch could allow for many different body types to wear I think. I’m 5’6” 120lbs w heavier thighs flat a$$ and wide hips and size 4 M length is loose perfect, goes over hips easily, I may even consider these high rise and length is perfect w a slight crease at ankle if wearing flats

Just perfect 👌🏽 I love these jeans, they are so comfortable and while not super stretchy like other jeans they do have adequate stretch and retain their shape unlike other jeans the material loosens during wear. They are well made and I absolutely love the way they envelope everything assets and liabilities 😂and packages them so sexily. I don't need to wear a belt with them because they just sit on my waist and don't move and it also gives my waist a slimming look. I got two pairs while on sale but even without a sale they are worth every penny, I am going to order two more pairs because the quality and workmanship is amazing. I highly recommend this morning product.
Great fit and price Great fit - I’m 5’ 148 lbs. I ordered a size 12 short they fit perfect - just enough stretch and not a heavy denim - perfect for warmer days .  The price was great $15 bucks
Short sizes are 28 inseams Nice jeans but since I bought “26 short” I expected to get 26w x 26L (inseam) instead of a 26wx28L. But still recommend to buy.
Button hole with not button The Jeans are cute but where is the button??? Quality assurance issue definitely.
Affordable jeans that fit nice These aren’t bad jeans but may have the gap in the back for thick girls. I find them comfortable but the gap is annoying but to lazy to return so will just deal

My definition of short is not the same as theirs. I so badly wish this jeans were truly ‘short’. I was super excited to see they were available in short. Alas, their definition is not the same as mine. The fit is perfection, in everything except length. I love that the denim feels soft.
Great jeans and great price! I have been looking for something to fit just right lately and these hit the spot. I am 5'2" and about 118 lbs. This is a size 4.

Love these jeans! Extremely comfortable jeans with wide waist band. Easy on and off. Lots of stretch. Excellent quality. Washes well. Medium weight. I purchased a Large. I am 5.4 to 5.5. in height and weigh 150. I do not have much difference in my waist and hips and this fits me perfectly, except they are about an inch longer than I'd like. If I can find some platform shoes, then they should be fine. I have washed them several times already and they did not shrink at all and did not pill. I loved them so much I purchased a second pair. I have to say I purchased two different shade of blue and they look exactly the same to me.
Aceptable Muy bueno .. estira

Not Bootcut, but Flare- with a capital "F"! I ordered two these two pairs of pants.  Their listings are identical except for color.  Dark blue (left in pic) and blue.  Other than color, they are both advertised EXACTLY the same:"FLYING BANANA Women's Totally Shaping Curvy Strtchy Bootcut Flare Denin ["denin"?] Jeans".So why are the ones on the right in the pic flared out waaay more than the darker ones?  I like the bootcut ones on the left, but the other look like flared 1960's bellbottoms... uh, no thank you.  Returning those.  By, why, oh why are they this different when they're advertised exactly the same?  Confused and disappointed.

My new favorite Levi’s These jeans are my favorite. They are not the classic denim material Levi’s from the 80s Gen Xers loved; they are the more forgiving with plenty of stretch and comfort we are looking for now. They look and feel amazing. The jeans are a good quality and the fit was exactly as described. I have bought two pair, my only complaint is that Amazon sold out my size 14 in other colors, but will be watching to buy more.
So comfy, but the faded area is off Love the fit and style, but the dye/ fade is not quite right, as you can see… there’s an abrupt demarcation between the dark and light parts.

Deep useable front pockets! Fits like they were made for me - 5'5"/118lbs/ size 4.  Size 4 is my usual size in pants.  Sometimes the waist in a 4 is a bit tight.  Waist fits perfectly on these.  The denim is medium weight with enough spandex for give and comfort. The length is perfect to wear with either flats or a small heel. I'm a pocket person and the front pockets on these are deep and usable! The leg drops comfortably from the widest part of the hip,  which makes my short legs look long.  They're wide leg but not crazy wide.  Measured at the hem,  seam to seam - 11" so 22" circumference.  I'd buy them again without hesitation.

Expect some shrinkage in length I have purchased several pairs of these jeans in different colors and they all fit great with plenty of stretch. Be aware that these jeans do vary slightly from one color to another. I noticed the darker colors seem to run slightly larger than the lighter ones.

I am short (5’-2”) so I bought the short inseam (actually 30” not 29” as noted in description), as recommended by the size chart. Upon trying them on, the leg length fell perfectly at my heal. After a few washes the length is now above my shoes and looks awkward. I then purchased the medium inseam (actually 32” not 31” as noted in description) which was a few inches too long. I had to fold them so they wouldn’t drag on the floor or bunch up at my shoes. After a few washes, sure enough, they shrank and the length is now perfect. I would recommend purchasing the longer inseam if you are in between the heights noted on the size chart.

Also, if you are like me and have bigger thighs, the material will pill quickly in the crotch area as well. I snapped a photo after a few months of wear, for reference.

Overall, I am satisfied with the jeans and would purchase again.

Soft denim, slightly stretchy, very comfortable.  True to size. Absolutely LOVE these pants.  Slightly stretchy and very soft denim.  Pants are nice and long for me (average seems to fit me just right in length, but I prefer long to have an extra inch or two) and these are perfect when I sit and don't go above my ankles.  Slimming all the way down to ankle, zipper is nice and smooth, and button is easy to use for my hands (I have fine motor skill issues).  I wear a 16 normally or a 14W and these fit perfectly me perfectly in a 16.  I am 5'4" and 180 lbs.

More flare than bootcut These jeans are comfortable, fit well, and the short length is perfect for me. They were delivered overnight which was crazy good. The reason for the 4 stars is that the product photo shows a true bootcut, but these are definitely flared.  Other than that, they are perfect for me and I’m keeping them.  Size 14Short. 5’1” 158 lbs

True to size, great material, a tad short. I’m 5’7” 135lbs. They fit so cute but they’re a tad short. Stretchy material, well made. I bought light and dark. True to size. I’m still wearing them with flat shoes, but they’re a bit short on me.

Not quality construction at all as in the past Its too bad I did not get them until after the return window closed!  The package had 2 labels to start with.  I wore them 3 times, then then the zipper pull came right off!
Petite jeans.  The advertised length was wrong. Nice jeans but the description stated thst "average" length was 31 inches (even for petite).  These were less than 28 inches.  Returned.

Plus Size Tight Fit (probably due to being listed as shapewear) I normally wear a plus size 16 and in my pictures, I am wearing a size 16 Long. My Measurements are 36 inch waist and 47 inch hips. The pants do fit very tight, but they are listed as being shaping pants. I'm used to wearing shapewear and they often fit tight like this so just be aware and size up if you don't want the pants fitting tight. I'm actively losing weight so I'm keeping these pants for that reason.

I was actually surprised that these pants fit very tight around the knees. I've never actually had that problem before. If you have big legs, you should probably not get these. For reference, my calves are 15 inches in circumference, and these pants are tight there as well in the size 16.

Could be better They fit great and are very flattering. However the color is not nearly as dark as the photos lead oh to believe. The jeans look very faded compared to the photos. If they were as dark and rich as the advertised, these would almost be perfect.

There is also zero stretch to these jeans, so they have to constantly be pulled up and fidgeted with. They felt very scratchy when I first received them (to the point where I was about to return them) but they are bearable after washing. Not soft by any means but more comfortable.

I am 5’7” and approx 185lbs and ordered a size 12. Seems true to size.

Not as pictured Very disappointed in these jeans. No white stitching as is pictured, which is why I ordered these as they look western with the white stitching. White wash is too prominent. Pockets aren't as bright either. Unfortunately I don't have time to return and order something else as I'm headed out of town. However, they fit, true to size, and are comfortable although the back of the waist feels like it sits lower than the front, which is right over my belly button, so dont sit quite as low on waist as pictured.

Frayed edges As with other Wrangler jeans i've purchased, I had to size up 1 size (12 to 14).  Weight is normal for wrangle jeans; color is faded light blue.  I'm retuning because they are frayed on the pockets and the bottom hem.  They look wore.  Not the look I was going for.

NOT tall girl friendly I don’t know If they sent me the wrong size, or if they think tall people don’t need a long inseam, but these were definitely too short. Disappointing because they were comfortable (if not a little thin) and stretchy. Would have been perfect if they were about 3 inches longer.

Perfect inseam for those under 5'3 The taper in this Amanda jean means that for curvy ones, you'll need to go up a size. With an hourglass figure, ample bottom, hips and thighs means I'd need to go up a size.

If you're figure is straight, this will fit. Pear-shapes, depending on thighs may need to size up, and so will apples.

However, the one thing that I did learn and appreciate was finding the perfect inseam length. Approximately 25" give or take. See the pics. The inseam is nowhere near 29". ShortPetite is the length for me. The jeans, however, are too tight and going back.
They snag worse than pantyhose. I’ve worn these jeggings twice, the snag worse than pantyhose - anything that you may lean or rub against, sit on, etc, will snag.

Perfect birthday gift, flattering and comfy, just a bit thin I bought these for my mom’s birthday and they ended up being perfect. The fit was flattering without being tight, and she loved how comfortable they were right out of the package no stiff “breaking in” period.

The rise and cut are really forgiving, especially if you want jeans that look put-together but still feel easy to wear all day.

Downside: the fabric is a little thinner than some premium jeans, so if you’re used to super thick denim, that’s something to note.

Overall though, they were a great gift and she’s already asked if they come in other washes, so I’d say that’s a win. 😊

Just like my 90's 501's I was nervous ordering these online since they aren't stretch jeans, but I wanted real denim, not stretchy denim. I am 5'3, 190# and ordered the 35 which is a 16. The length is just how I like jeans, the ends bend on top of my foot without being too long. They are not the most flattering on me, but that is because of my weight. I maybe could have gone down a size, especially after they relax, but the next size down is a 32 which would be too small. I am looking forward to the edges fraying and the natural fading on the knees and butt with wear, that's why i wanted real denim, which doesnt happen with jeans with stretch. Reminds me of the Levi's I used to wear in High School in the 90's.
fit I am 5'3" and the length is perfect. However, I did not receive the jeans pictured. The jeans I received have a sewed in front seam. see photo

Super comfortable but beware of snags These are as comfy as wearing sweatpants! The wide waistband is comfortable and doesn’t dig in. Love that it has usable pockets too. The length is fine for me (5’4”) if I wear low profile sneakers.

I deducted a star because the material snags SO easily that I don’t see them lasting that long. I’ve included a pic of some of the snags that have happened after wearing the pants less than 5 times. They occurred when…

1) my wedding ring, which has a smooth standard shared prong setting for the stones, brushed against the material when I rubbed my leg with my hand.
2) my dog put her paw on my leg to get my attention (her nails are trimmed)

Those things don’t cause snags in any of my other pants.

Maybe the darker color options don’t show snags as much.
Love these Great fit and quality. Perfect combo of being stretchy but also a firm/thick material

Sizing inconsistent, otherwise great I ordered 2 identical pairs of these jeans - same size and wash, in the same order, i.e. quantity 2, and they fit completely differently. One is like a size 8 and the other a 10. I realize that the fabric is stacked many layers deep for cutting and bottom layers may stretch, but the end product should be evaluated for basic dimensions. It does appear that they were manufactured in different batches (PO numbers are different), but the rest of label is the same 10M - W30 L32. When one is laid atop the other with the buttons done, the waist is an inch different and the length a half inch! They are great jeans, but size consistency is important and these lose stars for that.

Not for women with Curves. Straight Up and Down I am not impressed at all with these jeans, especially since they are Levi's.  They seem more polyester than anything.  They have that shiny sheen to the fabric, which I don't like, and they are very stretchy.  And where they can say that these are 'Totally Shaping Straight Jeans', well, they are straight jeans, that is for sure. But they are hardly shaping. By that I mean that they do not curve in at the waist at all.  They are straight up and down and have no curve whatsoever. For them to fit my waist, I would have to go down a size, but if I went down a size, they would not fit my hips and thighs.  I will keep them as I got them for under $14, but the waist gaps in the back so I will have to wear a belt.
Poor quality but great fit These jeans have a great fit and really help with the “mom pouch.” Unfortunately, after just 4 months, they ripped by the back pocket. Great fit but poor quality!

Sizing different with every color, one pair not even boot cut When they’re correct, these are my favorite jeans. They have great pockets, they’re super comfy, the higher rise is nice. I don’t think they’re true high rise, these are what mid-rise was 20 years ago. They sit just below my belly button.

Every cooler here is a different material, different cotton/spandex proportions, different fit, different cut of pants. Don’t be fooled by them all being listed as Bold High Rise Bootcut. Case-in-point, the pair I just ordered in my normal 32” length fits like a 34” and they’re straight leg. They’re worth it if you can play around with the sizing in each colorway since they’re all different pants. Many of them are plus size/curvy friendly but it’s very hit or miss.

Not a Mid Rise! The description of Midrise is inaccurate.  The jeans say High Rise on the label.  The material is authentic Levi Jean material with button fly.  As a shorter person with a very short torso I’m looking for a mid rise in this authentic Levi jean material.

Great fit, hate the “worn” look I would love to keep these jeans because they fit so well. They fall at waist, I don’t have to hem them and they are stretchy, almost everything I am looking for.
I made sure to order jeans that looked a solid color. They came with worn looking stripes. The kids might like those, but I want a new pair of jeans without it.
As much as I like them, I will probably return.
I don’t know how to avoid this. It was not obvious in photo or description.

Two Defective Pairs I don’t want to leave a negative review but I think it’s good information to have if you’re deciding to order or not. I received my first pair a few days ago, they looked good. I tried them on and one leg was longer than the other. Both legs were shorter than a 30 inch inseam which they were labeled to be. I exchanged them and the new pair arrived today. They fit long like I’d expect a 30 inch inseam to fit on me, so score there. In fact they seemed perfect, until I noticed two holes on the left thigh, like the fabric wasn’t properly made. It’s almost like they’re selling the defects from the factory but at full price and not telling you they’re the defects. Hopefully others have had better experience but this is mine,
Nice material but these pair came with stains also They are nice material and fit well, but sadly these are stained.

Perfect Form Fitting Pants in Size 2! Everyone will have a different comment on the fit, but that's because we are all different.  So just take all of these reviews with a grain of salt.  I am a Sidefeel fan because of the quality of the pants and the stretchability these give without looking like stretch pants.  I want a nice pair of jeans, that look like jeans, but also conform to my body.  These are it.  I am 5'3" and 125 lbs.  After losing 65 pounds, I wanted something form fitting, but also allowed for the unfortunate 'extra skin' that came with the weight loss. I also wanted to show off the weight loss and feel good about it.  These jeans allow that.  Besides looking great, these jeans have the stretch to allow for areas that are a little larger in size, while hugging the smaller areas.  I hate pants that have stretch but pucker out in other areas.  These pants hug all your curves without gaps and are so comfortable.  The length is perfect for my shorter height.  These pants are one of the few Sidefeel's styles that actually go down to a size 2 and I am grateful for that.  The only negative on these pants is the color.  I got the Washed Blue and thought they would be a little 'washier' like an acid wash.  But they are more blue, even though the picture doesn't really show that.  But still a 5 star pair of pants for a person that wants a form fitting pair of jeans on a not so perfect body.UPDATE:  I just wanted to add, after having these jeans and washing them, I am completely happy with this purchase.  I have gone on to buy more pairs of these jeans.  What I like so much about them is the way they have stretch in them.  Even after washing, they stretch to your body for the best comfort I have ever had in jeans.  They will stretch with you but they don't stretch out and leave the pants baggy.  I like my jeans form fitting, not baggy like some styles are now days. If you like jeans that hug to your body, I suggest you go down a size, as these will still give you comfort while making your body look nice.  The only thing that Sidefeel could improve upon is I wish they had more of their styles in Size 2 and give you the options of longer pants.  All their pants seem to be on the short side.  But these are the best jeans I've ever had!

Great Fit Questionable Quality The fit was great but the quality not so much. As others have stated, it would appear these are not typical Levi’s quality but lesser factory defects. I wore these twice in the span of 7 days and they have a snag and are coming apart.

Love these I love these pants for work. I work at an elementary school so these let me bend, squat and honestly run around comfortably, but also let me get away with looking semi professional.

I bought these in 3 colors, black light blue and dark blue!!! Only thing I wish is that they had belt loops for keys.

Currently weighing in at 195 and I'm 5'3.

Small fit, medium stretch, scratchy. I bought Brown L.  It fit like a US10.  Measurements are 30x30..  A medium amount of stretch and fit tight in the leg and knee. Knee measures 2 x 7.5”, or 15”Nice boot cut that keeps the cuffs from dragging.  The rise is med section at the hips on me. The only reason why I am returning them is the material is rough and scratchy, similar to burlap. This may get better after washing. The visible stitching thread has a slight golden color. The pockets have a WW design.The color of the jeans looks adobe red or brown with a little brick red in it.  Very hard to get a photo of the exact color.

Runs small in the waist and thighs, long I have several pairs of straight leg Lee jeans that fit me great so I was excited to order these! The sizing is totally different though. I literally took off another pair of size 8 Lee jeans to try these on in a Size 10 - they're *much* slimmer through the thigh and waist even though I went up a size, and the regular length was way too long on my 5'6" frame. The material seems similar to my older ones though.

They're probably cute, but unless you want them skin tight, size up x2 at least!

Sizing Photos and Info for Everyone Ok... I wound up ordering 3 pairs AND I already owned 2 pairs. I took photos to help everyone with sizing while I had them all together. I returned 2 pairs.

These seem to run big to be honest. I'm 5'4" and 110 lbs. I'm up 5 lbs because it was SO COLD this winter. Typically, at 105 I'm a solid size 25. Depends on the brand and cut, etc.

I read reviews and sized up one from my normal 25 and ordered a 26. Too baggy in the seat and crotch, as is normal with 501s. They are always lose in those areas. Then I ordered a 25 and then a 24. They are still a little lose but much better. There is no smaller size available right now, so they're the keepers.

This means... I am 5 lbs OVER my size 25 weight and still had to size DOWN to a 24.

The pics show sizes 24 through 28. 3 new from amazon and two I already had. There is barely an inch and a half between all sizes... total. Each pair BARELY gets about a half inch bigger with each size. You can see in the pics.

I also have pics of each size being worn. I will upload those later. On other phone.
Good fit Good fit, not too loose or too snug. A bit stretchy for my liking, worried it might stretch out. Length touches the floor when barefoot

Great until they ripped I would love to give this 5 stars because the way it fits is so comfortable. I absolutely love them for my 5 month postpartum body after my 5th baby. I have lipedema and I can feel so confident in these... Until they ripped. I've had them only a few weeks and I just received the second pair after loving them so much and then my daughter pointed out that there is a hole where the back pocket is stitched on my left side. I am going to try and mend it myself because I absolutely do love them but I am so disappointed about them not holding up very long.
Love these Good quality. Not see through. I’m 5’3” and 125. Size 4 works for me. I like the high waist and retro wider leg.
The Best jeans! Love love love these pants! So comfortable and I hate jeans!!!! So soft and loose feeling 🙂 a little long but that’s okay!

Way too long! These are really long! I love the fit around the hip, I was able to get a size smaller than I usually wear and they were still loose which I like, but I'm short as in 5'1" short and these pants are 5 1/2 inches longer than my usual jeans!  The attached photo shows my regular jeans on top of these jeans. I really wish that someone would make jeans for short people! I used to get the perfect fit at Blairs, but they went out of business, and I haven't been able to find a pair since. They're either too long or too tight. You used to be able to buy any jeans in a certain size, and they would all fit the same, but now it's a guessing game as to ones even the same brand and size! I can try on three pairs of pants in the same size and brand, and they will all fit differently. Guess I will be sending these back.
Wonderful fit We loved them
Why can't the size be what you say it is. Quality is good. Fit is all wrong once again. Definitely not 27 inch waist. Disappointed.

Sizes I bought three pairs of Lee’s jeans and was already aware of the sizing. They don’t have that plastic, artificial smell, and the quality is definitely there. I tried them on, and they’re slightly oversized on the waist, so I recommend sizing down. Either way, they’re perfect for work or any outdoor duties. :)

Good Pants overall Pockets are not deep enough. Cell phone sticks out. Overall fit is good. Fabric quality ok. The black fits the best, the others are a little longer in leg length, and a little smaller in body size.
Update Nov 2023. The Chic Classic 16 denim pant legs are starting to get holes in them. The weave or elastic in the weave is fraying, both legs. This is a manufacturer defect.

Miss leading pictures but I'm still keeping Pictures are missing leading, the stitching is not as pictured. That was a disappointment as that's what I wanted big light colored stitching. But I'm desperate for jeans and despite not being as pictured they are nice and look great and well made. The medium runs a little on the big side. They are good enough im keeping them. And I'll keep shopping for big light colored stitched pants

Poor quality garbage Absolutely not worth the money. Less than 5 weeks after buying them, there's a hole in the thigh area. I've got more use out of $15 jeans from Walmart. Don't waste your time or money, these are junk.
Disappointed :( These look nothing like the ones the model is wearing. I’ve bought jeans from Walmart for $15 that look better than these! Definitely returning! Size small, mid-blue

Nice jeans - tight in the waist I ordered a 12p Short in Coffee Roast. I love the dark chocolate brown, and the length is pretty good. I’m 161lbs, 5’2”. I was unable to zip the pants and I literally wear a size 12 in all my other jeans such as Lee brand. Super bummed but otherwise these are really nice quality. Thick jeans material and a nice curve in the hip, but I would recommend sizing up. I would’ve exchanged but I only wanted the brown and they didn’t have it in 14P short. Also they came in an already returned bag so it makes me think this may be a common issue with sizing.

Very comfy They are comfy but I feel run long. I was told to get my actual size but I will need a belt just to tighten a bit. I love that they are stretchy. Maybe I won’t step on them when I wear heels. Gave a 4bc too long.

Already Coming Apart They were amazing fitting and cute BUT after only one wash, with directions followed exactly, the material started to have strings come out of it. I would have just returned them for another but the return window has closed. I have several of their leggings and have never had this issues before. Very disappointing since they are now cheap pants.
Nice style The pants came in good condition. Accurate fitting. The camera makes it look brighter red but it's kinda burgundish red
Fits 10/10 It’s amazing! Perfect fit only thing is if you are short it might need to be tailored but the fits amazing!

Jeans are great.. not the extra on the packaging Great jeans.. not so great packaging... I'm thinking its soap or from a wax melts but really didn't want the extra with my jeans.. only reason I took a star off

Soft but very baggy legs The fit of these jeans is nothing like pictured. These are classic Amandas, but pictured are skinny jeans. Legs are very baggy.
Love how soft these are, but wish the legs weren’t so loose

Comfy stylish stretch These Amazon skinny jeans are perfect! They feel like a much more expensive brand. I got 2 sizes my regular and size up to account for the holiday lbs and both were fine. The reg still fit albeit snug but good stretch and the size up fit good around the middle but not too loose. I highly recommend for the price! I paired them with Athlefit (yellow) knee high boots and loved the look. Y’all won’t be disappointed.

Overall Good Overall I like the jeans.  I'm 5 ft 7 in and 145-150 lbs.  They have a relaxed fit that loosens even more as the day goes on.  I have to wear a belt with these despite ordering my normal size of 6. I usually can get away with standard length in pants,  but I ordered these in a long after reading other reviews. I'm glad I did because the long was just long enough. These may run a bit short.  Knocking off a star because one of the belt loops broke within the first couple of wears.

Kept a pair, but smelly, runs large, and shallow front pockets. Shallow small pockets for such wide leg pants. Really weird smell on the darker or anything other than the really light blue…
I do like how they are mostly cotton at least although there is some polyester about 19%.

I really wanna reiterate, be aware of the smell and it doesn’t seem to wash out!!!
It’s very strong!

I did decide to keep them, I’m hoping that smell washes away eventually.

Fitted more in the waist, shows that you have a butt and then flares or relaxes down to the feet.

For whatever reason it recommended I size up to a 34 inch, my actual waist measurement is 31 inches, I ended up keeping a 29 inch pant, and I still had waist gaping. But you can see in my pictures- the dark blue pants were a size 31. The light blue pants were a size 29. I kept the 29 but in the darker blue.

Nice, but not long term Color? Exactly what I was expecting
I usually wear leggings and thought if they looked like jeans it would look a little nicer, these? Perfect leggings, pockets are functional!!
Waist is high waisted, perfect for the leggings feel and a little tummy control.

Really comfy, really cute, but they don't last long 🫤 about three months of wearing and washing has them getting runs through the material, so not very rip resistant, see pic.
Cute and comfy Mild stretch to waist band
They forgot to sewed on a button, so I did for them. They fit nice, for the price.

Fabric quality low Got these while they were on sale, wore them a handful of times and they developed rips along the sides of the pockets. Fit and size were perfect but the fabric quality wasn’t great.
Not as pictured Front pockets look nothing like the picture. There is no stitching but plain. But overall, they fit nice. Fabric is nice as well.
Comfortable for All-Day Wear These jeggings are really comfortable and soft. They fit nicely and feel relaxing to wear. I can wear them all day without any discomfort. I’m happy with this purchase.

Nice 👍 I have this one and the black one. I like the material and fit; however, it’s a bit tight around the waist (I don’t have a flat tummy) but not to where it needs to be returned. So keep that in mind, they seem to run small around the waist.
